   \]  
3. 代入计算：  
   \[
   C_5^3 = 10, \quad p^3 = 0.7^3 = 0.343, \quad (1-p)^2 = 0.3^2 = 0.09
   \]  
   \[
   P = 10 \times 0.343 \times 0.09 = 0.3087
   \]  
**易错提示**：注意区分成功概率与失败概率的指数位置，避免将 \( p \) 和 \( (1-p) \) 的幂次写反。

questions.question: Multivariate distributions can describe:

options.C: either discrete or continuous random variables.

questions.explanation: Multivariate distributions can describe discrete or continuous random variables.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察多元分布（Multivariate distributions）的定义，即它适用于何种类型的随机变量。

**解题步骤**：
1.  回忆多元分布的核心概念，它涉及多个随机变量的联合概率分布。
2.  判断这些随机变量的类型。在概率论中，随机变量分为离散型和连续型。
3.  得出结论：多元分布可以同时描述多个随机变量，这些变量可以是离散的、连续的，或者混合类型。

**易错提示**：不要将“多元”（多个变量）与变量的“类型”（离散或连续）混淆，误以为多元分布只适用于其中一种类型。

questions.question: A stock portfolio has had a historical average annual return of 12% and a standard deviation of 20%. The returns are normally distributed. The range -27.2 to 51.2% describes a:
questions.explanation: The upper limit of the range, 51.2%, is (51.2 - 12) = 39.2 / 20 = 1.96 standard deviations above the mean of 12. The lower limit of the range is (12 - (-27.2)) = 39.2 / 20 = 1.96 standard deviations below the mean of 12. A 95% confidence level is defined by a range 1.96 standard deviations above and below the mean.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布下置信区间与标准差倍数的对应关系（关键值：90%对应1.65，95%对应1.96，99%对应2.58）。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 计算区间上下限距离均值的标准差倍数：(51.2% - 12%) / 20% = 1.96，同理 (-27.2% - 12%) / 20% = -1.96。  
2. 根据关键值对应关系，1.96倍标准差对应95%的置信区间。  
**易错提示**：勿混淆不同置信水平对应的标准差倍数（如误将1.96当作68%或99%的对应值）。

questions.question: A random variable X is continuous and bounded between zero and five, X:(@ X ≤ 5). The cumulative distribution function (cdf) for X is F(x) = x / 5. Calculate P(Z X ≤ 4).
questions.explanation: For a continuous distribution, P(a≤ X ≤b) = F(b) - F(a). Here, F(4) = 0.8 and F(2) = 0.4. Note also that this is a uniform distribution over 0< × ≤ 5 so Prob(2 < x < 4) = (4 - 2) / 5 = 40%.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：连续型随机变量的概率计算，掌握累积分布函数（cdf）的性质和均匀分布的概率求法。

**解题步骤**：
1. 根据题意，随机变量X在[0,5]上连续，其累积分布函数为F(x)=x/5。题目要求计算P(2 < X ≤ 4)。
2. 对于连续型分布，概率P(a < X ≤ b) = F(b) - F(a)。
3. 分别计算F(4)=4/5=0.8，F(2)=2/5=0.4，两者相减得0.8-0.4=0.4，即40%。

**易错提示**：注意区分概率P(X ≤ a)与P(a < X ≤ b)的计算公式，避免直接使用F(4)而忽略减去F(2)。

questions.question: A grant writer for a local school district is trying to justify an application for funding an after- school program for low-income families. Census information for the school district shows an average household income of $26,200 with a standard deviation of $8,960. Assuming that the household income is normally distributed, what is the percentage of households in the school district with incomes of less than $12,000?
questions.explanation: Z= ($12,000 - $26,200) / $8,960 = - 1.58. From the table of areas under the standard normal curve, 5.71% of observations are more than 1.58 standard deviations below the mean.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布概率计算，通过Z值查表求低于某值的累积概率。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 计算Z值：\( Z = \frac{12000 - 26200}{8960} \approx -1.58 \)。  
2. 查标准正态分布表，Z=1.58对应的左侧尾部面积约为0.0571（即5.71%）。  
**易错提示**：注意Z值为负时，直接查表得左侧概率，勿误用右侧概率或对称面积。

questions.question: If a stock decreases from $90 to $80, the continuously compounded rate of return for the period is:
questions.explanation: This is given by the natural logarithm of the new price divided by the old price; In(80 / 90) = -0.1178.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：连续复利收益率的计算，公式为 \( r = \ln\left(\frac{P_1}{P_0}\right) \)。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确定期初价格 \( P_0 = 90 \) 和期末价格 \( P_1 = 80 \)。  
2. 计算价格变化比率 \( \frac{P_1}{P_0} = \frac{80}{90} \approx 0.8889 \)。  
3. 对该比率取自然对数：\( \ln(0.8889) \approx -0.1178 \)。  
**易错提示**：不要直接使用简单收益率公式 \( (P_1 - P_0)/P_0 \)，否则会得到错误选项 -0.1000 或 -0.1250。

questions.question: The probability that a normally distributed random variable will be more than two standard deviations above its mean is:
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布中，随机变量落在均值特定标准差范围内的概率计算。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 首先，确定题目要求的是“超过均值两个标准差以上”的概率，即 P(Z > 2)。  
2. 查标准正态分布表，F(2) = 0.9772，表示 P(Z ≤ 2) 的概率。  
3. 因此，P(Z > 2) = 1 - F(2) = 1 - 0.9772 = 0.0228。  
**易错提示**：注意区分“超过两个标准差”与“在两个标准差之内”的概率，避免直接使用 0.4772 错误选项。

questions.question: In a normal distribution, the:
questions.explanation: A normal distribution has a zero skew (which implies a symmetrical distribution). When skew is zero, the mean, median, and mode are all equal. Kurtosis of a normal distribution is 3.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布的基本性质，包括偏度、峰度以及均值、中位数和众数的关系。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 回忆正态分布的特征：对称分布，偏度为0，峰度为3。  
2. 在对称分布中，均值、中位数、众数三者相等。  
3. 选项A描述中位数等于众数，符合正态分布性质；选项B（正偏）和C（峰度为4）均错误。  
**易错提示**：注意正态分布的峰度是3，而非4（4对应尖峰分布）。

questions.question: For a certain class of junk bonds, the probability of default in a given year is 0.2. Whether one bond defaults is independent of whether another bond defaults. For a portfolio of five of these junk bonds, what is the probability that zero or one bond of the five defaults in the year ahead?
questions.explanation: The outcome follows a binomial distribution where n = 5 and p = 0.2. In this case p(0) = 0.85 = 0.3277 and p(1) = 5 × 0.8t × 0.2 = 0.4096, so P(X=0 or X=1) = 0.3277 + 0.4096.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察二项分布的概率计算，已知试验次数n和每次成功（此处为违约）的概率p，求特定事件概率。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确定参数：n=5（债券数量），p=0.2（违约概率），违约相互独立。  
2. 计算零次违约概率：P(X=0)=C(5,0)×(0.2)^0×(0.8)^5=1×1×0.32768=0.3277。  
3. 计算一次违约概率：P(X=1)=C(5,1)×(0.2)^1×(0.8)^4=5×0.2×0.4096=0.4096。  
4. 求和：P(X=0或1)=0.3277+0.4096=0.7373。  
**易错提示**：注意“零或一次违约”需分别计算两种情况概率再相加，勿漏算或混淆组合数C(n,x)。

questions.question: Expected returns and standard deviations of returns for three portfolios are shown in the following table: Portfolio Expected Return Standard Deviation 9% 5% 2 8% 4% 7% 3% 3 Assuming the risk-free rate is 3%, an investor who wants to minimize the probability of returns less than 5% should choose:
questions.explanation: The probability of returns less than 5% can be minimized by selecting the portfolio with the greatest safety-first ratio using a threshold return of 5%: Portfolio 1 = (9 - 5) / 5 = 4/5 = 0.80 Portfolio 2 = (8 - 5) / 4 = 3/4 = 0.75 Portfolio 3 = (7 - 5) / 3 = 2/3 = 0.67
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察安全第一比率（Safety-first ratio）的计算与应用，用于在给定最低门槛收益率下选择最优投资组合。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确定门槛收益率（本题为5%）和风险-free rate（3%），但计算安全第一比率时直接使用门槛收益率。  
2. 计算各组合的安全第一比率：SFR = (组合预期收益率 - 门槛收益率) / 组合标准差。  
3. 比较各组合的SFR，选择比率最高的组合（因为SFR越高，收益率低于门槛的概率越小）。  
**易错提示**：注意不要误用夏普比率（使用无风险利率），本题门槛是5%而非无风险利率。

questions.question: A food retailer has determined that the mean household income of her customers is $47,500 with a standard deviation of $12,500. She is trying to justify carrying a line of luxury food items that would appeal to households with incomes greater than $60,000. Based on her information and assuming that household incomes are normally distributed, what percentage of households in her customer base has incomes of $60,000 or more?
questions.explanation: Z= ($60,000 - $47,500) / $12,500 = 1.0 From the table of areas under the normal curve, 84.13% of observations lie to the left of +1 standard deviation of the mean. So, 100% - 84.13% = 15.87% with incomes of $60,000 or more.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布概率计算，通过Z值查表求右尾概率。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 计算Z值：\( Z = \frac{60000 - 47500}{12500} = 1.0 \)  
2. 查标准正态分布表，Z=1.0对应的左侧累积概率为84.13%  
3. 求右尾概率：\( 100\% - 84.13\% = 15.87\% \)  
**易错提示**：注意题目问的是“大于等于60000”的右尾概率，而非左侧概率。

questions.question: An investment has an expected return of 10% with a standard deviation of 5%. If the returns are normally distributed, the probability of losing money isclosestto:
questions.explanation: Using the standard normal probability distribution, observation-mean 0-10 • = -2.0, the chance of getting zero or less return Z = standard deviation 5 (losing money) is 1 - 0.9772 = 0.0228% or 2.28%. An alternative explanation: the expected return is 10%. To lose money means the return must fall below zero. Zero is about two standard deviations to the left of the mean. 50% of the time, a return will be below the mean, and 2.5% of the observations are below two standard deviations down. About 97.5% of the time, the return will be above zero. Thus, only about a 2.5% chance exists of
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布下，利用Z值计算收益率低于特定值的概率。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 计算零收益率的Z值：Z = (0% - 10%) / 5% = -2.0。  
2. 查标准正态分布表，Z = -2.0对应的左侧概率约为2.28%。  
3. 该概率即亏损（收益率<0%）的概率，最接近2.5%。  
**易错提示**：注意Z值计算时均值和标准差的单位统一，且勿混淆单侧与双侧概率。

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT an assumption of the binomial distribution?

options.B: The expected value is a whole number.

questions.explanation: The expected value is n x p. A simple example shows us that the expected value does not have to be a whole number: n = 5, p = 0.5, n x p = 2.5. The other conditions are necessary for the binomial distribution.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察二项分布的基本假设条件，需明确其定义和前提。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 回顾二项分布的假设：随机变量X是离散的、每次试验相互独立、每次试验只有两种可能结果（成功/失败）、成功概率p保持不变。  
2. 分析选项：A（随机变量离散）和C（试验独立）均为二项分布的假设；B（期望值为整数）并非必要，因为期望值E(X)=n×p可能是小数。  
3. 通过举例验证：如n=5，p=0.5时，E(X)=2.5，非整数，故B不是二项分布的假设。  
**易错提示**：误将期望值的计算结果（可能为小数）当作必须满足的整数条件。

questions.question: Which of the following is/east likelyto be an example of a discrete random variable?

options.A: The number of days of sunshine in the month of May 2006 in a particular city. X
options.B: The rate of return on a real estate investment.
options.C: Quoted stock prices on the NASDAQ.

questions.explanation: The rate of return on a real estate investment, or any other investment, is an example of a continuous random variable because the possible outcomes of rates of return are infinite (e.g., 10.0%, 10.01%, 10.001%, etc.). Both of the other choices are measurable (countable).
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察离散型随机变量与连续型随机变量的区分，关键看变量的可能取值是否可数。

**解题步骤**：
1. 判断每个选项的变量取值特征：是否可数（整数）还是无限可分（实数）。
2. A项：某月晴天数是整数，可数，属于离散型变量。
3. C项：NASDAQ股票报价虽看似连续，但实际交易中以最小变动单位（如0.01美元）报价，本质是可数的离散值。
4. B项：房地产投资收益率理论上可以在给定区间内取无限多个值（如10.1%、10.11%等），属于连续型变量，因此最不可能是离散型变量。

**易错提示**：容易误将股票价格（C）视为连续变量，但实际交易中受最小报价单位限制，是离散的。

questions.question: A multivariate distribution isbest defined as describing the behavior of:

options.A: a random variable with more than two possible outcomes.
options.B: two or more independent random variables.
options.C: two or more dependent random variables.

questions.explanation: A multivariate distribution describes the relationships between two or more random variables, when the behavior of each random variable is dependent on the others in some way.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：多元分布的定义，即描述多个随机变量之间的依赖关系。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 理解多元分布的核心是描述多个随机变量的联合行为。  
2. 判断各选项：A 描述的是单一随机变量的多结果，不符合；B 强调变量独立，而多元分布通常关注变量间的依赖关系；C 强调两个或多个依赖的随机变量，符合定义。  
3. 结合定义，选择最准确的描述。  
**易错提示**：注意多元分布关注的是变量间的依赖关系，而非仅变量数量或独立性。

questions.question: Which one of the following statements about the t-distribution isost accurate?

options.B: The t-distribution has thinner tails compared to the normal distribution. The t-distribution approaches the standard normal distribution as the degrees

questions.explanation: As the number of degrees of freedom grows, the t-distribution approaches the shape of the standard normal distribution. Compared to the normal distribution, the t-distribution has fatter tails. The t-distribution is symmetric about the mean and so it has skewness of zero.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：t分布的基本性质，包括其对称性、尾部特征以及与正态分布的关系。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 判断选项A：t分布是对称分布，偏度为0，因此“positively skewed”错误。  
2. 判断选项B：t分布相比正态分布有更厚的尾部（fatter tails），而非更薄（thinner），因此该表述错误。  
3. 判断选项C：当自由度增加时，t分布逐渐接近标准正态分布，这是t分布的关键性质，表述准确。  
**易错提示**：注意t分布尾部比正态分布更厚，而非更薄，不要混淆这一特征。

questions.question: Assume 30% of the CFA candidates have a degree in economics. A random sample of three CFA candidates is selected. What is the probability that none of them has a degree in economics?
questions.explanation: The probability of 0 successes in 3 trials is: [3! / (013!)] (0.39 (0.7)3 = 0.343
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察二项分布的概率计算，即已知单次成功概率和试验次数，求特定成功次数的概率。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确定单次成功概率：候选人拥有经济学学位的概率为 0.3，则“没有学位”的概率为 0.7。  
2. 应用二项分布公式：计算 3 次试验中成功次数为 0 的概率，公式为 \( P(X=0) = (1-p)^n \)。  
3. 代入计算：\( P(X=0) = (0.7)^3 = 0.343 \)。  
**易错提示**：注意区分“有学位”与“没有学位”的概率，避免误用 0.3 直接计算。

questions.question: Consider a random variable X that follows a continuous uniform distribution: Z X ≤ 20. Which of the following statements isleast accurate?
questions.explanation: F(21) = 1.00. For a cumulative distribution function, the expression F(X) refers to the probability of an outcome less than or equal to x. In this distribution all the possible outcomes are between 7 and 20. Therefore the probability of an outcome less than or equal to 21 is 100%. The other choices are true. • F(10) = (10 - 7) / (20 - 7) = 3 / 13 = 0.23 • F(12 ≤ X ≤ 16) = F(16) - F(12) = [(16 - 7) / (20 - 7)] - [(12 - 7) / (20 - 7)] = 0.692 - 0.385 = 0.307
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：连续均匀分布的累积分布函数（CDF）计算及其定义域理解。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确认分布范围：题目隐含 X 服从 [7, 20] 的连续均匀分布（由解析反推）。  
2. 计算各选项：  
   - A：F(12 ≤ X ≤ 16) = F(16) - F(12) = (16-7)/(20-7) - (12-7)/(20-7) ≈ 0.692 - 0.385 = 0.307，正确。  
   - B：F(21) 表示 X ≤ 21 的概率，由于 X 最大值为 20，因此概率为 1.00，而非 0.00。  
   - C：F(10) = (10-7)/(20-7) = 3/13 ≈ 0.23，正确。  
3. 对比选项：B 的数值错误，故最不准确。  
**易错提示**：注意 CDF 在定义域外的取值（小于下限时为 0，大于上限时为 1）。

questions.question: A stock portfolio's returns are normally distributed. It has had a mean annual return of 25% with a standard deviation of 40%. The probability of a return between -41% and 91% is closest to.
questions.explanation: A 90% confidence level includes the range between plus and minus 1.65 standard deviations from the mean. (91 - 25) / 40 = 1.65 and (-41 - 25) / 40 = -1.65.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布下，给定均值和标准差，计算特定区间对应的概率（置信区间）。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 将区间端点标准化为z值：\( z_1 = \frac{-41\% - 25\%}{40\%} = -1.65 \)，\( z_2 = \frac{91\% - 25\%}{40\%} = 1.65 \)。  
2. 查标准正态分布表，z=1.65对应的双侧置信区间约为90%（即均值±1.65标准差覆盖约90%数据）。  
3. 因此，收益率落在-41%至91%之间的概率最接近90%。  
**易错提示**：注意区分不同z值对应的置信水平（如1.65对应90%，1.96对应95%），避免混淆。

questions.question: The mean return of a portfolio is 20% and its standard deviation is 4%. The returns are normally distributed. Which of the following statements about this distribution artast accurate? The probability of receiving a return:
questions.explanation: The probability of receiving a return greater than 16% is calculated by adding the probability of a return between 16% and 20% (given a mean of 20% and a standard deviation of 4%, this interval is the left tail of one standard deviation from the mean, which includes 34% of the observations.) to the area from 20% and higher (which starts at the mean and increases to infinity and includes 50% of the observations.) The probability of a return greater than 16% is 34 + 50 = 84%. Note: 0.16 is the probability of receiving a returness than 16%.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布概率计算，利用均值、标准差和标准正态分布表（或经验法则）判断特定区间对应的概率。

**解题步骤**：
1. 已知均值μ=20%，标准差σ=4%。将各选项中的收益率与均值比较，计算其距离均值的标准差倍数（z值）。
2. 对于选项B，16%距离均值20%为-4%，即低于均值1个标准差（z = -1）。根据正态分布性质，收益率大于均值（20%）的概率为50%，介于均值与低于均值1个标准差之间（16%至20%）的概率约为34%。因此，收益率大于16%的概率约为50% + 34% = 84%，而收益率小于16%的概率约为16%（即100% - 84%）。
3. 验证其他选项：A项（小于12%，即低于均值2个标准差）概率约为2.5%，但题目问的是“less than 12%”，概率应为约0.025（即2.5%），但表述为“is 0.025”可能指概率值恰好为0.025，而实际正态分布中该概率约为0.0228，并非精确0.025；C项（12%至28%，即均值±2个标准差）概率约为95%，但实际概率约为95.45%，且区间计算不精确（12%至28%跨度为16%，恰好是4个标准差，但若按均值20%±2σ计算，应为12%至28%，概率约为95%），但严格来说，该概率并非精确0.95。因此，B项描述“in excess of 16% is 0.16”虽不精确（实际小于16%的概率约为0.1587，四舍五入为0.16），但在三个选项中最接近准确。

**易错提示**：注意区分“大于某值”

questions.question: Which of the following qualifies as a cumulative distribution function?
questions.explanation: Because a cumulative probability function defines the probability that a random variable takes a value equal to or less than a given number, for successively larger numbers, the cumulative probability values must stay the same or increase.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察累积分布函数（CDF）的基本性质，即CDF必须是非递减函数，且值域在[0,1]之间。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 检查每个选项中，随着x值增大，对应的F(x)值是否单调非减（即后一个值不能小于前一个值）。  
2. 同时确认所有F(x)值是否在0到1之间。  
3. 选项A：F(1)=0, F(2)=0.25, F(3)=0.50, F(4)=1，满足单调递增且值域合理，符合CDF性质。  
**易错提示**：注意CDF的值不能减少，如选项B中F(4)=0小于前值，选项C中F(2)小于F(1)，均违反非递减性质。

questions.question: For a random variable defined over the interval 0 to 1 that has a cumulative distribution function of F(x) = X, the probability of an outcome between 20% and 70% isclosestto:
questions.explanation: The probability of x < 0.7 is 0.P = 0.343, and the probability of x < 0.2 = 0.2 = 0.008, so the probability of 0.2 < × < 0.7 = 0.343 - 0.008 = 33.5%, which is closest to 1/3.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考查连续型随机变量在给定累积分布函数（CDF）下，计算某一区间概率的方法。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 根据题意，累积分布函数为 F(x) = x（定义域 x ∈ [0,1]）。  
2. 计算 P(0.2 < X < 0.7) = F(0.7) - F(0.2) = 0.7 - 0.2 = 0.5。  
3. 注意：解析中给出的计算数值（0.343 和 0.008）有误，正确计算应为 0.5，但选项中最接近 0.5 的是 1/2（即 0.5），因此正确答案为 C。  
**易错提示**：直接使用 CDF 计算区间概率时，需注意减去下限的累积概率，并确保计算准确。

questions.question: One of the major limitations of Monte Carlo simulation is that it:

options.A: cannot provide the insight that analytic methods can.
options.B: does not lend itself to performing "what if" scenarios.
options.C: requires that variables be modeled using the normal distribution.

questions.explanation: The major limitations of Monte Carlo simulation are that it is fairly complex and will provide answers that are no better than the assumptions used and that it cannot provide the insights that analytic methods can. Monte Carlo simulation is useful for performing "what if" scenarios. One of the first steps in Monte Carlo simulation is to specify the probably distribution along with the distribution parameters. The distribution specified
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察蒙特卡洛模拟的主要局限性，需区分其与解析方法的特点。

**解题步骤**：
1. 识别蒙特卡洛模拟的核心特点：它是一种基于随机抽样的数值方法，通过大量模拟来估计结果。
2. 分析各选项：A项指出其无法提供解析方法那样的深入见解（例如，无法得出封闭形式的解或明确显示变量间的理论关系），这是其公认局限；B项错误，因为“what if”分析正是其优势；C项错误，因蒙特卡洛模拟可使用多种分布，不限于正态分布。
3. 结合知识点确认：蒙特卡洛模拟的结果依赖于模型假设，且无法像解析方法那样提供清晰的理论洞察。

**易错提示**：注意不要将蒙特卡洛模拟的灵活性（如支持多种分布和情景分析）误认为是其局限。

questions.question: The mean and standard deviation of returns for three portfolios are listed below in percentage terms. Portfolio X: Mean 5%, standard deviation 3%. Portfolio Y: Mean 14%, standard deviation 20%. Portfolio Z: Mean 19%, standard deviation 28%. Using Roy's safety-first criteria and a threshold of 4%, select the optimal portfolio.
questions.explanation: Portfolio Z has the largest value for the SFRatio: (19 - 4) / 28 = 0.5357. For Portfolio X, the SFRatio is (5 - 4) / 3 = 0.3333. For Portfolio Y, the SFRatio is (14 - 4) / 20 = 0.5000.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察 Roy's safety-first criterion 中 SFRatio 的计算与比较，用于在给定最低收益阈值下选择最优组合。

**解题步骤**：
1. 根据 Roy's safety-first criterion，计算每个组合的 SFRatio = (组合预期收益率 - 最低阈值收益率) / 组合收益率标准差。
2. 分别计算：组合 X = (5 - 4) / 3 = 0.333；组合 Y = (14 - 4) / 20 = 0.500；组合 Z = (19 - 4) / 28 ≈ 0.536。
3. 比较三个 SFRatio，数值最大的组合 Z 为最优选择。

**易错提示**：注意公式中分子是预期收益率减去阈值收益率，不要误减其他数值或忽略百分号单位的一致性。

questions.question: The probability density function of a continuous uniform distribution ibest described by a:

options.C: line segment with a curvilinear slope.

questions.explanation: By definition, for a continuous uniform distribution, the probability density function is a horizontal line segment over a range of values such that the area under the segment (total probability of an outcome in the range) equals one.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：连续均匀分布的概率密度函数图形特征。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 回忆连续均匀分布的定义：在定义区间内，概率密度函数值为常数。  
2. 常数函数在坐标系中表示为水平线段。  
3. 确认该水平线段下的面积（即概率总和）为1。  
**易错提示**：不要误以为均匀分布是斜线或曲线，其概率密度在区间内保持不变。

questions.question: The continuously compounded rate of return that will generate a one-year holding period return of -6.5% is closestto:
questions.explanation: Continuously compounded rate of return = In(1 - 0.065) = -6.72%.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察连续复利收益率与持有期收益率的转换公式，即 \( r_{cc} = \ln(1 + HPR) \)。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 将持有期收益率（HPR）代入公式：\( r_{cc} = \ln(1 + (-0.065)) = \ln(0.935) \)。  
2. 计算 \( \ln(0.935) \) 的近似值，约为 -0.0672。  
3. 将结果转化为百分比：-6.72%，最接近选项 C（-6.7%）。  
**易错提示**：注意持有期收益率为负时，直接代入公式即可，避免误用算术计算或忽略对数运算。

questions.question: A multivariate distribution:

options.B: gives multiple probabilities for the same outcome.
options.C: specifies the probabilities associated with groups of random variables.

questions.explanation: A multivariate distribution specifies the probabilities for a group of related random variables.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：多元分布的定义，即描述多个随机变量及其联合概率的分布。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 理解多元分布的核心概念：涉及多个随机变量。  
2. 对比选项：A 错误，因多元分布不限于二项分布；B 错误，因一个结果对应一个概率，不会给出多个概率；C 正确，直接对应多元分布的定义。  
**易错提示**：注意多元分布关注的是多个变量组成的群体，而非单个变量的重复概率。

questions.question: A stock that pays no dividend is currently priced at €42.00. One year ago the stock was €44.23. The continuously compounded rate of return isclosest to.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：连续复利收益率的计算，公式为 \( r = \ln\left(\frac{S_t}{S_0}\right) \)。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确定期初价格 \( S_0 = 44.23 \)，期末价格 \( S_t = 42.00 \)。  
2. 计算价格比率 \( \frac{S_t}{S_0} = \frac{42.00}{44.23} \approx 0.9496 \)。  
3. 取自然对数：\( r = \ln(0.9496) \approx -0.0517 \)，即 -5.17%。  
**易错提示**：注意期初和期末价格不要颠倒，否则会得到错误的正收益率。

questions.question: The average amount of snow that falls during January in Frostbite Falls is normally distributed with a mean of 35 inches and a standard deviation of 5 inches. The probability that the snowfall amount in January of next year will be between 40 inches and 26.75 inches is closestto:
questions.explanation: To calculate this answer, we will use the properties of the standard normal distribution. First, we will calculate the Z-value for the upper and lower points and then we will determine the approximate probability covering that range.Note: This question is an example of why it is important to memorize the general properties of the normal distribution. Z = (observation - population mean) / standard deviation • Z26.75 = (26.75 - 35) / 5 = -1.65. (1.65 standard deviations to the left of the mean) • Z40 = (40 - 35) / 5 = 1.0 (1 standard deviation to the right of the mean) Using the general approximations of the normal distribution: • 68% of the observations fall within t one standard deviation of the mean. So, 34% of the area falls between 0 and +1 standard deviation from the mean. • 90% of the observations fall within ‡ 1.65 standard deviations of the mean. So, 45% of the area falls between 0 and +1.65 standard deviations from the mean. Here, we have 34% to the right of the mean and 45% to the left of the mean, for a total of 79%.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布的概率计算，利用Z值转换和标准正态分布的经验法则（68-90-95-99规则）。

**解题步骤**：
1. 将给定值转换为Z值：  
   Z₁ = (40 - 35) / 5 = 1.0  
   Z₂ = (26.75 - 35) / 5 = -1.65
2. 根据经验法则：  
   - Z在0到1之间对应的概率约为34%（因为±1内为68%，单侧为34%）  
   - Z在0到1.65之间对应的概率约为45%（因为±1.65内约为90%，单侧为45%）
3. 所求概率为Z在-1.65到1.0之间的面积，即左侧45% + 右侧34% = 79%。

**易错提示**：注意Z值的正负方向，以及经验法则中对应概率是双侧还是单侧面积。

questions.question: A lognormal distribution isleast likelyto be:
questions.explanation: A lognormal distribution is positively skewed and is bounded below by zero. If stock returns are continuously compounded, then prices follow a lognormal distribution under certain conditions.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察对数正态分布（lognormal distribution）的基本性质，包括其偏度、取值范围以及在金融中的应用。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 回顾对数正态分布的特征：其变量取对数后服从正态分布，因此原变量取值必须大于零（有下界零）。  
2. 理解偏度：对数正态分布的形状是右偏（正偏），而不是左偏（负偏）。  
3. 确认常见应用：在金融中，若股票连续复利收益率服从正态分布，则股票价格服从对数正态分布。  
**易错提示**：容易误以为对数正态分布对称或负偏，实际上它总是正偏且取值非负。

questions.question: A normal distribution can be completely described by its:
questions.explanation: The normal distribution can be completely described by its mean and variance.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布的特征，即完全由均值和方差（或标准差）决定。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 回忆正态分布的定义：对称的钟形曲线，完全由两个参数决定。  
2. 确认这两个参数是均值（决定位置）和方差（决定形状的离散程度）。  
3. 排除其他选项：众数在正态分布中等于均值，但不能单独描述分布；偏度和峰度在正态分布中固定（偏度为0，峰度为3），不能作为描述参数。  
**易错提示**：注意不要将描述性统计量（如偏度、峰度）与决定分布形态的必要参数混淆。

questions.question: A multivariate normal distribution that includes three random variables can be completely described by the means and variances of each of the random variables and the:

options.A: correlation coefficient of the three random variables.
options.B: correlations between each pair of random variables.
options.C: conditional probabilities among the three random variables.

questions.explanation: A multivariate normal distribution that includes three random variables can be completely described by the means and variances of each of the random variables and the correlations between each pair of random variables. Correlation measures the strength of the linear relationship between two random variables (thus, "the correlation coefficient of the three random variables" is inaccurate).
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：多元正态分布的完全描述参数，包括各变量的均值、方差以及两两之间的相关系数。

**解题步骤**：
1.  识别题目核心：一个包含三个随机变量的多元正态分布，需要哪些参数才能被完全描述。
2.  回忆定义：对于n个变量的多元正态分布，其完全描述需要：①每个变量的均值；②每个变量的方差；③每对变量之间的相关系数（或协方差）。
3.  匹配选项：选项B“每对随机变量之间的相关性”准确对应了所需的成对相关系数。

**易错提示**：注意“三个随机变量的相关系数”（A选项）表述不准确，因为相关系数总是定义在两个变量之间。

questions.question: An investment has a mean return of 15% and a standard deviation of returns equal to 10%. If returns are normally distributed, which of the following statements ideast accurate? The probability of obtaining a return:
questions.explanation: Sixty-eight percent of all observations fall within +/- one standard deviation of the mean of a normal distribution. Given a mean of 15 and a standard deviation of 10, the probability of having an actual observation fall within one standard deviation, between 5 and 25, is 68%. The probability of an observation greater than 25 is half of the remaining 32%, or 16%. This is the same probability as an observation less than 5. Because 95% of all observations will fall within 20 of the mean, the probability of an actual observation being greater than 35 is half of the remaining 5%, or 2.5%.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布下，收益率落在均值±1倍、±2倍标准差范围内的概率（68-95-99法则）。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 均值=15%，标准差=10%。根据正态分布经验法则：约68%的数据落在均值±1个标准差内（即5%至25%），约95%落在均值±2个标准差内（即-5%至35%）。  
2. 选项A：大于25%的概率是均值右侧1个标准差以外的部分，即(1-68%)/2=16%，但选项给出0.32（32%），明显错误。  
3. 选项B：大于35%的概率是均值右侧2个标准差以外的部分，即(1-95%)/2=2.5%，对应0.025，正确。  
4. 选项C：5%至25%是均值±1个标准差，概率约为68%，对应0.68，正确。  
**易错提示**：注意区分“大于某值”的概率是单侧尾部的面积，需将超出范围的概率除以2。

questions.question: Possible outcomes for a discrete uniform distribution are the integers 2 to 9 inclusive. What is the probability of an outcome less than 5? 8
questions.explanation: This distribution has eight discrete outcomes, each with an equal probability of 1/8 or 12.5%. Because three of the eight outcomes are less than 5, the probability of an outcome less than 5 is 3/8 or 37.5%.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察离散均匀分布的概率计算，需确定总可能结果数及满足条件的结果数。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确定分布范围：整数2至9（含），总共有8个可能结果（2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9）。  
2. 计算每个结果的概率：离散均匀分布中，每个结果概率相等，为1/8 = 12.5%。  
3. 找出小于5的结果：即2、3、4，共3个结果，概率为3/8 = 37.5%。  
**易错提示**：注意分布范围包含首尾整数，避免计数错误或忽略“包含”条件。

questions.question: A cumulative distribution function for a random variablet is given as follows: F(x) 5 0.14 10| 0.25 15 0.86 20 | 1.00 The probability of an outcome less than or equal to 10 is:
questions.explanation: A cumulative distribution function (cdf) gives the probability of an outcome for a random variable less than or equal to a specific value. For the random variable, the cdf for the outcome 10 is 0.25, which means there is a 25% probability that will take a value less than or equal to 10.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察累积分布函数（cdf）的定义，即 F(x) = P(X ≤ x) 的概率值。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 理解题目给出的累积分布函数 F(x) 表格：当 x=10 时，对应的 F(10)=0.25。  
2. 根据 cdf 的定义，F(10) 直接表示随机变量取值小于等于 10 的概率。  
3. 将概率 0.25 转换为百分比，即 25%。  
**易错提示**：不要将累积概率与单个点的概率混淆，本题直接查表即可，无需计算差值。

questions.question: If a random variablex is lognormally distributed then Inx is:
questions.explanation: For any random variable that is lognormally distributed, its natural logarithm (In) will be normally distributed.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：对数正态分布的定义，即若随机变量 X 服从对数正态分布，则其自然对数 ln(X) 服从正态分布。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 理解对数正态分布的基本性质：若 X 服从对数正态分布，则 ln(X) 服从正态分布。  
2. 直接根据定义判断，ln(X) 是正态分布。  
**易错提示**：不要混淆对数正态分布与正态分布，X 本身不是正态分布，而是 ln(X) 是正态分布。

questions.question: The annual rainfall amount in Yucutat, Alaska, is normally distributed with a mean of 150 inches and a standard deviation of 20 inches. The 90% confidence interval for the annual rainfall in Yucutat is closestto:
questions.explanation: The 90% confidence interval is u ‡ 1.65 standard deviations. 150 - 1.65(20) = 117 and 150 + 1.65(20) = 183.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察正态分布下置信区间的计算，关键要掌握不同置信水平对应的关键值（z值）。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确定90%置信区间对应的z值：双尾90%置信区间，两侧尾部面积各为5%，查z表得关键值约为1.65。  
2. 计算区间下限：均值 - z值 × 标准差 = 150 - 1.65 × 20 = 117。  
3. 计算区间上限：均值 + z值 × 标准差 = 150 + 1.65 × 20 = 183。  
**易错提示**：注意区分不同置信水平对应的z值（如90%用1.65，95%用1.96），勿混淆或误用。

questions.question: A portfolio manager is looking at an investment that has an expected annual return of 10% with a standard deviation of annual returns of 5%. Assuming the returns are approximately normally distributed, the probability that the return will exceed 20% in any given year is closestto:
questions.explanation: Given that the standard deviation is 5%, a 20% return is two standard deviations above the expected return of 10%. Assuming a normal distribution, the probability of getting a result more than two standard deviations above the expected return is 1 - Prob (& 2) = 1 - 0.9772 = 0.0228 or 2.28% (from the Z table).
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布下，利用Z值计算收益率超过某一阈值的概率。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 计算Z值：Z = (20% - 10%) / 5% = 2。  
2. 查标准正态分布表，Z=2对应的累积概率为0.9772，即收益率小于等于20%的概率。  
3. 收益率超过20%的概率 = 1 - 0.9772 = 0.0228 = 2.28%。  
**易错提示**：注意题目问的是“超过”（exceed）的概率，需用1减去累积概率，而非直接使用Z值对应的概率。

questions.question: Which of the following distributions can only take on positive values?
questions.explanation: The F-distribution can only take on positive values. Normal distributions and Student's distribution can have both positive and negative values.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察不同概率分布的取值范围特性，特别是F分布、正态分布和t分布的值域区别。

**解题步骤**：
1. 回顾各分布的基本性质：F分布由两个独立卡方变量之比构成，卡方变量非负，因此F分布取值恒为正。
2. 正态分布取值范围为全体实数（-∞, +∞），可正可负。
3. 学生t分布取值范围也为全体实数（-∞, +∞），可正可负。
4. 因此只有F分布仅能取正值。

**易错提示**：易混淆t分布与F分布的性质，需牢记t分布是对称分布且取值范围包含负数。

questions.question: A probability distribution is/east likelyto:

options.C: give the probability that the distribution is realistic.

questions.explanation: The probabillity distribution may or may not reflect reality. But the probability distribution must list all possible outcomes, and probabilities can only have non-negative values.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察概率分布的基本性质，即概率分布必须满足的条件。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 回顾概率分布的定义：它列出了随机事件所有可能的结果及其对应的概率。  
2. 分析各选项：A项（包含所有可能结果）和B项（概率非负）都是概率分布的必要条件。  
3. C项（给出分布符合现实的可能性）不是概率分布的定义要求，而是对模型适用性的判断。  
**易错提示**：注意区分概率分布的定义性质与其在实际应用中的真实性。

questions.question: Approximately 95% of all observations for a normally distributed random variable fall in the interval:
questions.explanation: The following confidence intervals give the range within which a normally distributed random variable will lie a certain percentage of the time. 68% confidence interval: u + 10 90% confidence interval: u ‡ 1.650 95% confidence interval: u ‡ 1.96 99% confidence interval: u ‡ 2.58 So 95% of observations roughly lie 2 standard deviations of the mean.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布中观测值落在均值附近区间的概率（置信区间）。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 回忆正态分布下常见置信区间对应的标准差倍数：95% 对应约 2 个标准差。  
2. 题目中区间形式为 "u ‡ 20"，其中 "0" 代表标准差倍数，即 2 倍标准差。  
3. 因此 "u ‡ 20" 表示均值加减 2 个标准差，对应约 95% 的观测值。  
**易错提示**：注意区分不同置信水平对应的标准差倍数（如 68% 对应 1 个标准差）。

questions.question: The mean and standard deviation of returns on three portfolios are listed below in percentage terms: • Portfolio X: Mean 5%, standard deviation 3%. • Portfolio Y: Mean 14%, standard deviation 20%. • Portfolio Z: Mean 19%, standard deviation 28%. Using Roy's safety first criteria and a threshold of 3%, which of these is the optimal portfolio?
questions.explanation: According to the safety-first criterion, the optimal portfolio is the one that has the largest value for the SFRatio (mean - threshold) / standard deviation. For Portfolio X, (5 - 3) / 3 = 0.67. For Portfolio Y, (14 - 3) / 20 = 0.55. For Portfolio Z, (19 - 3) / 28 = 0.57.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：Roy's safety-first criterion 的计算与应用，通过SFRatio（均值减阈值除以标准差）选择最优组合。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 计算各组合的SFRatio：SFR = (组合均值 - 阈值) / 标准差。  
2. 比较三个SFR值：Portfolio X为0.67，Y为0.55，Z为0.57。  
3. 选择SFR最大的组合，即Portfolio X。  
**易错提示**：误认为高收益或低风险的组合直接最优，而忽略SFRatio的综合比较。

questions.question: Cumulative z-table: 0.02 0.00 0.03 0.01 1.6 0.9452 0.9463 0.9474 0.9484 1.7 0.9554 0.9564 0.9573 0.9582 1.8 0.9641 0.9649 0.9656 | 0.9664 Monthly sales of hot water heaters are approximately normally distributed with a mean of 21 and a standard deviation of 5. What is the probability of selling 12 hot water heaters or less next month?
questions.explanation: Z = (12 - 21) / 5 = -1.8 From the cumulativez-table, the probability of being more than 1.8 standard deviations below the mean, probability x < -1.8, is 3.59%.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察正态分布概率计算，需使用z-score查表法。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 计算z-score：z = (12 - 21) / 5 = -1.8。  
2. 查累积z表（左侧概率），z=1.8对应概率为0.9641（即96.41%），这是小于1.8的概率。  
3. 由于z=-1.8，所求概率为左侧尾部概率：1 - 0.9641 = 0.0359 = 3.59%。  
**易错提示**：注意z-score为负时，应查表得右侧概率再用1减，或直接利用对称性得左侧尾部概率。

questions.question: An investor is considering investing in one of the following three portfolios: Portfolio X Portfolio Y Portfolio Z Statistical Measures Expected annual return 22% 12% 17% Standard deviation of return 14% 20% 25% If the investor's minimum acceptable return is 5%, the optimal portfolio using Roy's safety- first criterion is:
questions.explanation: 12-5 Portfolio X: SFRatio = - = 0.50 14 17-5 Portfolio Y: SFRatio = = 0.60 20 22-5 Portfolio Z: SFRatio - = 0.68 25 According to the safety-first criterion, Portfolio Z, with the largest ratio (0.68), is the best
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：Roy's safety-first criterion 的计算与应用，即通过比较投资组合的SFRatio（期望收益率与最低可接受收益率的差除以标准差）来选择最优组合。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 计算每个组合的SFRatio，公式为（期望收益率 - 最低可接受收益率）/ 标准差。  
2. 比较三个组合的SFRatio，数值最大的为最优组合。  
3. 计算得：Portfolio X = (22% - 5%) / 14% = 1.214；Portfolio Y = (12% - 5%) / 20% = 0.35；Portfolio Z = (17% - 5%) / 25% = 0.48。  
**易错提示**：注意公式中分子是期望收益率减去最低可接受收益率，不要误用其他收益率或忽略减法步骤。

questions.question: A normal distribution is completely described by its:
questions.explanation: By definition, a normal distribution is completely described by its mean and variance.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布的定义，即完全由均值和方差（或标准差）描述。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 回忆正态分布的特性：对称、钟形曲线，所有高阶矩（如偏度、峰度）固定。  
2. 确认描述正态分布所需的最少参数：均值决定位置，方差决定形态。  
3. 对比选项，只有B（均值和方差）符合定义。  
**易错提示**：注意正态分布的偏度为0、峰度为3，但这些不是独立参数，不能“完全描述”分布。

questions.question: Which of the following would/east likelybe categorized as a multivariate distribution?

options.A: The return of a stock and the return of the DJIA.
options.B: The days a stock traded and the days it did not trade.
options.C: The returns of the stocks in the DJIA.

questions.explanation: The number of days a stock traded and did not trade describes only one random variable. Both of the other cases involve two or more random variables.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察多元分布的定义，即涉及两个或以上随机变量的概率分布。

**解题步骤**：
1. 理解多元分布的核心特征：必须包含两个或以上的随机变量。
2. 分析各选项：
   - A项：单只股票收益与道琼斯指数收益，涉及两个随机变量。
   - B项：股票交易的天数与未交易的天数，这是对同一事件（交易日）的两种互斥结果的描述，本质上是一个随机变量（例如“交易状态”）。
   - C项：道琼斯指数中各成分股的收益，涉及多个（30个）随机变量。
3. 因此，最不可能被归类为多元分布的是B项。

**易错提示**：注意区分一个随机变量的不同结果与多个不同的随机变量。

questions.question: A stated interest rate of 9% compounded continuously results in an effective annual rate closest to.
questions.explanation: The effective annual rate with continuous compounding = le- 1 = e .09 - 1 = 0.09417, or 9.42%.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：连续复利下有效年利率（EAR）的计算公式：EAR = e^r - 1，其中 r 为年名义利率。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确认年名义利率 r = 9% = 0.09。  
2. 代入连续复利公式：EAR = e^0.09 - 1。  
3. 计算 e^0.09 ≈ 1.09417，则 EAR ≈ 1.09417 - 1 = 0.09417 = 9.42%。  
**易错提示**：注意区分连续复利与普通复利公式，勿直接使用 (1 + r/m)^m - 1 计算。

questions.question: A discount brokerage firm states that the time between a customer order for a trade and the execution of the order is uniformly distributed between three minutes and fifteen minutes. If a customer orders a trade at 11:54 A.M., what is the probability that the order is executed after noon?
questions.explanation: The limits of the uniform distribution are three and 15. Since the problem concerns time, it is continuous. Noon is six minutes after 11:54 A.M. The probability the order is executed after noon is (15 - 6) / (15 - 3) = 0.75.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：连续均匀分布的概率计算，公式为 P(X > a) = (上限 - a) / (上限 - 下限)。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确定分布区间：题目中等待时间在3到15分钟之间均匀分布，即下限为3，上限为15。  
2. 确定事件条件：顾客在11:54下单，问中午12点后执行的概率。从11:54到12:00间隔为6分钟，即求等待时间超过6分钟的概率。  
3. 代入公式计算：P(等待时间 > 6) = (15 - 6) / (15 - 3) = 9 / 12 = 0.75。  
**易错提示**：注意均匀分布是连续的，概率计算基于区间长度比例，而非简单计数。

questions.question: For a binomial random variable with a 40% probability of success on each trial, the expected number of successes in 12 trials isclosestto:
questions.explanation: A binomial random variable has an expected value or mean equal top. Mean = 12(0.4) = 4.8.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考查二项分布随机变量的期望值计算，公式为 E(X) = n × p。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确定试验次数 n = 12，每次试验成功的概率 p = 0.4。  
2. 代入公式计算期望值：E(X) = 12 × 0.4 = 4.8。  
**易错提示**：注意不要误用方差公式（n×p×(1-p)）或误将概率直接作为答案。

questions.question: A dealer in a casino has rolled a five on a single die three times in a row. What is the probability of her rolling another five on the next roll, assuming it is a fair die?
questions.explanation: The probability of a value being rolled is 1/6 regardless of the previous value rolled.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察独立事件的概率计算，即每次掷骰子的结果相互独立，不受历史结果影响。

**解题步骤**：
1. 确认骰子是公平的，每个面朝上的概率均等。
2. 由于每次掷骰子是独立事件，之前的结果不影响下一次。
3. 因此，掷出5的概率始终是1/6 ≈ 0.167。

**易错提示**：不要误以为之前连续出现三次5会影响下一次概率（赌徒谬误）。

questions.question: A client will move his investment account unless the portfolio manager earns at least a 10% rate of return on his account. The rate of return for the portfolio that the portfolio manager has chosen has a normal probability distribution with an expected return of 19% and a standard deviation of 4.5%. What is the probability that the portfolio manager will keep this account?
questions.explanation: Since we are only concerned with values that are below a 10% return this is a 1 tailed test to the left of the mean on the normal curve. Withu = 19 and o = 4.5, P(X ≥ 10) = P(X≥ H- 20) therefore looking up -2 on the cumulative Z table gives us a value of 0.0228, meaning that (1 - 0.0228) = 97.72% of the area under the normal curve is above a Z score of -2. Since the Z score of -2 corresponds with the lower level 10% rate of return of the portfolio this means that there is a 97.72% probability that the portfolio will earn at least a 10% rate of return.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布概率计算，通过Z值查表求累积概率。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 计算10%回报率对应的Z值：Z = (10% - 19%) / 4.5% = -2。  
2. 查标准正态分布表，Z = -2对应的左侧累积概率为0.0228，即回报率低于10%的概率为2.28%。  
3. 求回报率不低于10%的概率：1 - 0.0228 = 0.9772 ≈ 97.7%。  
**易错提示**：注意题目要求的是不低于10%的概率，需用1减去左侧累积概率，而非直接使用Z值对应的概率。

questions.question: The t-distribution is appropriate for constructing confidence intervals based on small samples from a population with:

options.A: unknown variance and a normal distribution.
options.B: known variance and a non-normal distribution.
options.C: unknown variance and a non-normal distribution.

questions.explanation: The t-distribution is the appropriate distribution to use when constructing confidence intervals based on small samples from populations with unknown variance that are normally distributed. If the population is not normally distributed, no test statistic is available for small samples regardless of whether the population variance is known.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察t分布在构建置信区间时的适用条件，特别是小样本情况下对总体方差和分布形态的要求。

**解题步骤**：
1. 明确t分布的核心应用场景：适用于总体方差未知时，用样本方差来估计总体方差，并构建置信区间或进行假设检验。
2. 判断样本量影响：题目指明是“小样本”，这加强了对总体分布形态的要求。
3. 结合条件筛选：在总体方差未知的情况下，只有当总体服从或近似服从正态分布时，小样本的t分布才是适用的。如果总体非正态，小样本下缺乏有效的检验统计量。

**易错提示**：容易忽略“小样本”这一条件对总体分布形态（必须为正态）的严格要求，而错误选择涉及“非正态分布”的选项。

questions.question: For an F-distribution where both chi-square random variables are based on a sample size of 10, the degrees of freedom in the numerator are:
questions.explanation: The degrees of freedom in the numerator and the denominator are the sample size minus one.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：F分布的自由度计算，分子自由度 = 样本容量 - 1。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 题目指出两个卡方随机变量均基于样本容量为10。  
2. F分布的分子自由度 = 样本容量 - 1 = 10 - 1 = 9。  
**易错提示**：注意区分分子自由度和分母自由度，本题只问分子自由度。

questions.question: Three portfolios with normally distributed returns are available to an investor who wants to minimize the probability that the portfolio return will be less than 5%. The risk and return characteristics of these portfolios are shown in the following table: Portfolio Expected return Standard deviation 4% 6% Epps Flake 7% 9% 10% 15% Grant Based on Roy's safety-first criterion, which portfolio should the investor select?
questions.explanation: Roy's safety-first ratios for the three portfolios: Epps = (6 - 5) / 4 = 0.25 Flake = (7 - 5) / 9 = 0.222 Grant = (10 - 5) / 15 = 0.33 The portfolio with the largest safety-first ratio has the lowest probability of a return less than 5%. The investor should select the Grant portfolio.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：Roy's safety-first criterion 的计算与应用，即通过计算安全第一比率（(E(R) - RL) / σ）来选择使回报低于最低可接受回报概率最小的投资组合。

**解题步骤**：
1. 确定题目给定的最低可接受回报率（threshold return）为5%。
2. 分别计算三个投资组合的安全第一比率：  
   Epps: (6% - 5%) / 4% = 0.25  
   Flake: (7% - 5%) / 9% ≈ 0.222  
   Grant: (10% - 5%) / 15% ≈ 0.333
3. 比较三个比率，选择比率最大的投资组合，即Grant组合。

**易错提示**：注意公式中分子是预期回报减去最低要求回报，不要误用或颠倒顺序。

questions.question: If X follows a continuous uniform distribution over the interval 1 < X < 26, the probability that X is between 5 and 15 isclosestto:
questions.explanation: Because this distribution is uniform, the probability of an outcome between 5 and 15 is the ratio of that interval to the entire interval from 1 to 26. (15 - 5) / (26 - 1) = 10 / 25 = 0.40.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：连续均匀分布的概率计算，即概率 = (目标区间长度) / (总区间长度)。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 计算总区间长度：26 - 1 = 25。  
2. 计算目标区间长度：15 - 5 = 10。  
3. 计算概率：10 / 25 = 0.40 = 40%。  
**易错提示**：注意区间是开区间（1 < X < 26），但计算长度时直接使用端点值相减即可，不影响结果。

questions.question: The number of days a particular stock increases in a given five-day period is uniformly distributed between zero and five inclusive. In a given five-day trading week, what is the probability that the stock will increase exactly three days?
questions.explanation: If the possible outcomes are X:(0,1,2,3,4,5), then the probability of each of the six outcomes is 1 / 6 = 0.167.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察离散均匀分布的概率计算，即每个可能结果概率相等的分布。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确定可能结果：股票在5天内上涨的天数可以是0、1、2、3、4、5天，共6种可能。  
2. 由于是离散均匀分布，每个结果的概率相同，计算概率为1/6。  
3. 因此上涨恰好3天的概率为1/6 ≈ 0.167。  
**易错提示**：注意“均匀分布”在此处是离散的，而非连续均匀分布，不能错误使用连续分布的概率密度计算。

questions.question: Which statement best describes the properties of Student's t-distribution? The t-distribution is:

options.A: symmetrical, and defined by a single parameter.
options.B: symmetrical, and defined by two parameters.
options.C: skewed, and defined by a single parameter.

questions.explanation: The t-distribution is symmetrical like the normal distribution but unlike the normal distribution is defined by a single parameter known as the degrees of freedom.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：t分布的性质，包括对称性和参数定义（与正态分布对比）。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 回忆t分布的形状特征：与正态分布类似，t分布是对称分布。  
2. 确认t分布的参数：仅由自由度（degrees of freedom）一个参数定义，而正态分布由均值和方差两个参数定义。  
3. 结合选项判断：对称且由单一参数描述，对应选项A。  
**易错提示**：易误记t分布为有偏分布或误以为需要两个参数（如均值和标准差）。

questions.question: Standardizing a normally distributed random variable requires the:
questions.explanation: All that is necessary is to know the mean and the variance. Subtracting the mean from the random variable and dividing the difference by the standard deviation standardizes the variable.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布随机变量标准化的公式（Z = (X - μ) / σ）所需参数。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 回顾标准化公式：Z = (X - μ) / σ。  
2. 公式中需要用到均值（μ）和标准差（σ）。  
3. 因此，标准化只需均值和标准差。  
**易错提示**：注意方差（variance）是标准差的平方，但公式中直接使用的是标准差，而非方差。

questions.question: Which of the following isleast likelya probability distribution?

options.B: Roll an irregular die: p(1) = p(2) = p(3) = p(4) = 0.2 and p(5) = p(6) = 0.1.
options.C: Zeta Corp.: P(dividend increases) = 0.60, P(dividend decreases) = 0.30.

questions.explanation: All the probabilities must be listed. In the case of Zeta Corp. the probabilities do not sum to one.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考查概率分布的基本性质，即所有可能结果的概率之和必须等于1。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 分别计算每个选项中所有给定概率的总和。  
2. 检查总和是否等于1，若不等，则不符合概率分布的定义。  
3. 选项A总和为0.5+0.5=1，选项B总和为0.2×4+0.1×2=1，选项C总和为0.60+0.30=0.90≠1。  
**易错提示**：注意题目问的是“最不可能”为概率分布的选项，需找出概率总和不等于1的情况。

questions.question: As degrees of freedom increase, the Chi-square and F-distributionsnost likelybecome more:
questions.explanation: As the degrees of freedom increase, the Chi-square and F-distributions become more symmetric and bell shaped. These distributions can only take on positive values.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察卡方分布和F分布随自由度增加时的形态变化特征。

**解题步骤**：
1. 回忆卡方分布和F分布的基本性质：两者均为正偏态（右偏）分布，取值均为正数。
2. 理解自由度的影响：当自由度较小时，分布呈现明显的右偏形态，不对称。
3. 推断趋势：随着自由度不断增大，这两种分布的形态逐渐趋于对称，并越来越接近钟形（类似于正态分布的形状）。

**易错提示**：注意不要混淆“取值始终为正”与“分布形态”，自由度增加改变的是形状（对称性），而非取值范围。

questions.question: A random variable follows a continuous uniform distribution over 27 to 89. What is the probability of an outcome between 34 and 38?
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：连续均匀分布的概率计算，公式为 P(a ≤ X ≤ b) = (b - a) / (上限 - 下限)。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确定分布范围：下限 = 27，上限 = 89。  
2. 计算目标区间长度：38 - 34 = 4。  
3. 计算概率：4 / (89 - 27) = 4 / 62 ≈ 0.0645。  
**易错提示**：误用离散均匀分布公式或忘记用区间长度除以总范围长度。

questions.question: For a given stated annual rate of return, compared to the effective rate of return with discrete compounding, the effective rate of return with continuous compounding will be:
questions.explanation: A higher frequency of compounding leads to a higher effective rate of return. The effective rate of return with continuous compounding will, therefore, be greater than any effective rate of return with discrete compounding.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察不同复利频率（离散复利 vs. 连续复利）下有效年利率（EAR）的比较。

**解题步骤**：
1. 理解有效年利率（EAR）与复利频率的关系：在给定相同名义年利率（stated annual rate）下，复利频率越高，有效年利率越大。
2. 比较离散复利与连续复利：离散复利的最高频率是每日复利，而连续复利是复利频率的极限情况（无限次复利）。
3. 得出结论：连续复利的有效年利率是所有离散复利有效年利率的上限，因此它一定高于任何离散复利下的有效年利率。

**易错提示**：不要混淆名义利率和有效利率，本题是在相同名义利率前提下比较不同复利频率的有效利率。

questions.question: For a Chi-square distribution with a sample size of 10 the degrees of freedom are:
questions.explanation: Degrees of freedom for the Chi-square distribution are the sample size minus one.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：卡方分布的自由度计算，公式为自由度 = 样本容量 - 1。
**解题步骤**：
1. 确认题目给出的样本容量为10。
2. 根据卡方分布自由度的计算公式：自由度 = n - 1。
3. 代入计算：10 - 1 = 9。
**易错提示**：不要误将样本容量直接当作自由度。

questions.question: Over a period of one year, an investor's portfolio has declined in value from 127,350 to 108,427. What is the continuously compounded rate of return?
questions.explanation: The continuously compounded rate of return = In($ / So) = In(108,427 / 127,350) = - 16.09%.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：连续复利收益率的计算公式：r = ln(S₁/S₀)。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 计算期末与期初价值的比值：108,427 / 127,350 ≈ 0.8513。  
2. 取该比值的自然对数：ln(0.8513) ≈ -0.1609。  
3. 将结果转化为百分比：-0.1609 × 100% = -16.09%。  
**易错提示**：注意区分连续复利与普通复利计算，本题直接使用自然对数而非算术差值。

questions.question: The lower limit of a normal distribution is:
questions.explanation: By definition, a true normal distribution has a positive probability density function from negative to positive infinity.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察正态分布的基本性质，即其取值范围。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 回忆正态分布的定义：它是一个连续概率分布，其概率密度函数在整个实数域上都有定义。  
2. 因此，正态分布的下限是负无穷，上限是正无穷。  
**易错提示**：不要将正态分布与取值范围有限的分布（如均匀分布或对数正态分布）混淆。

questions.question: Which of the following statements about a normal distribution iseast accurate? Approximately 68% of the observations lie within +/- 1 standard deviation of th

options.B: The mean and variance completely define a normal distribution.
options.C: A normal distribution has excess kurtosis of three.

questions.explanation: Even though normal curves have different sizes, they all have identical shape characteristics. The kurtosis for all normal distributions is three; an excess kurtosis of three would indicate a leptokurtic distribution. Both remaining choices are true.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：正态分布的基本性质，包括标准差区间占比、参数定义以及峰度特征。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 判断选项A：正态分布中约68%的观测值落在均值±1个标准差范围内，正确。  
2. 判断选项B：正态分布完全由均值和方差（或标准差）定义，正确。  
3. 判断选项C：正态分布的峰度为3，但“超额峰度”定义为峰度减3，因此正态分布的超额峰度为0，而非3。  
**易错提示**：混淆“峰度”与“超额峰度”，正态分布的峰度为3，超额峰度为0。

questions.question: Monte Carlo simulation is necessary to:
questions.explanation: This is the purpose of this type of simulation. The point is to construct distributions using complex combinations of hypothesized parameters.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察蒙特卡洛模拟（Monte Carlo simulation）的主要用途和特点。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 理解蒙特卡洛模拟的核心功能：它是一种通过随机抽样和统计实验来近似解决复杂问题的计算方法。  
2. 分析各选项：A选项描述的是近似解决复杂问题，符合定义；B选项计算连续复利收益可通过公式直接完成，无需模拟；C选项减少抽样误差并非模拟的必要性或直接目的，抽样误差通常通过增加模拟次数缓解，但模拟本身可能引入误差。  
3. 结合知识点判断：蒙特卡洛模拟常用于处理涉及随机变量、多参数组合的复杂模型，而其他选项并非其必要或独特用途。  
**易错提示**：注意蒙特卡洛模拟是“近似”解决复杂问题，而非精确计算或直接减少误差。

questions.question: Which of the following distributions ismost likelya discrete distribution?
questions.explanation: The binomial distribution is a discrete distribution, while the normal distribution is an example of a continuous distribution. Univariate distributions can be discrete or continuous.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察离散分布与连续分布的区别，需识别典型离散分布（如二项分布）和连续分布（如正态分布）。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 明确离散分布的定义：随机变量取值可数（如整数）。  
2. 分析各选项：A“单变量分布”可离散或连续，不明确；B“正态分布”是典型连续分布；C“二项分布”描述成功次数，取值非负整数，属于离散分布。  
3. 对比后选择最符合离散分布特征的选项C。  
**易错提示**：注意“单变量分布”未指定离散性，不能直接视为离散分布。

questions.question: An analyst divides the population of U.S. stocks into 10 equally sized sub-samples based on market value of equity. Then he takes a random sample of 50 from each of the 10 sub- samples and pools the data to create a sample of 500. This is an example of:
questions.explanation: In stratified random sampling we first divide the population into subgroups, called strata, based on some classification scheme. Then we randomly select a sample from each stratum and pool the results. The size of the samples from each strata is based on the relative size of the strata relative to the population. Simple random sampling is a method of selecting a sample in such a way that each item or person in the population being studied has the same (non-zero) likelihood of being included in the sample.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察抽样方法的分类，重点区分简单随机抽样、分层随机抽样和系统抽样。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 识别题目中的关键操作：先将总体（美国股票）按市值分为10个等容量的子组（层）。  
2. 从每个子组中随机抽取50个样本，最后合并成500个样本的总样本。  
3. 此过程符合分层随机抽样（先分层，再在各层内随机抽样）的定义。  
**易错提示**：注意分层抽样中每层样本量通常按层占比分配，但本题中层是等容量的，抽取数量相同，这仍属于分层随机抽样的变体。

questions.question: Which of the following statements regarding the central limit theorem (CLT) iseast accurate? The CLT: states that for a population with mean u and variance 6, the sampling

options.A: distribution of the sample means for any sample of size n will be approximatel V normally distributed. By gives the variance of the distribution of sample means as 6/ n, where of is the * population variance and n is the sample size.
options.C: holds for any population distribution, assuming a large sample size.

questions.explanation: This question is asking you to select the inaccurate statement. The CLT states that for a population with mean u and a finite varianceo-. , the sampling distribution of the sample means becomes approximately normally distributedas the sample size becomes large The other statements are accurate.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：中心极限定理（CLT）的成立条件与结论  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 明确题目要求找出“最不准确”的陈述。  
2. 回顾CLT核心内容：当样本量足够大时，无论总体分布如何，样本均值的抽样分布近似正态分布，其方差为总体方差除以样本量（σ²/n）。  
3. 分析选项：A项声称“对于任意样本量n”都近似正态分布，忽略了“大样本”前提，因此不准确；B项给出了正确的方差公式；C项指出“在大样本下适用于任何总体分布”，符合CLT条件。  
**易错提示**：注意CLT要求样本量足够大，且总体方差有限，并非适用于任意小样本。

questions.question: Which of the following characterizes the typical construction of a confidence intervahost accurately?
questions.explanation: We can construct a confidence interval by adding and subtracting some amount from the point estimate. In general, confidence intervals have the following form: Point estimate +/- Reliability factor x Standard error Point estimate= the value of a sample statistic of the population parameter Reliability factor= a number that depends on the sampling distribution of the point estimate and the probability the point estimate falls in the confidence interval (1 e) Standard error= the standard error of the point estimate
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：置信区间的标准构建公式，即点估计值加减可靠因子乘以标准误。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 回忆置信区间的基本结构：以点估计值为中心，加减一个误差范围。  
2. 误差范围由可靠因子（如z值或t值）与标准误的乘积构成。  
3. 对比选项，只有B符合“点估计 ± (可靠因子 × 标准误)”的正确形式。  
**易错提示**：注意可靠因子和标准误的位置，避免将两者相除或颠倒顺序。

questions.question: A traffic engineer is trying to measure the effects of carpool-only lanes on the expressway. Based on a sample of 1,000 cars at rush hour, he finds that the mean number of occupants per car is 2.5, with a standard deviation of 0.4. Assuming that the population is normally distributed, what is the confidence interval at the 5% significance level for the number of occupants per car?
questions.explanation: The Z-score corresponding with a 5% significance level (95% confidence level) is 1.96. The confidence interval is equal to: 2.5 = 1.96(0.4 N1,000) = 2.475 to 2.525. (We can use Z- scores because the size of the sample is so large.)
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察在总体方差已知且样本量较大时，使用Z统计量构建总体均值的置信区间。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确定置信水平为95%，对应Z值为1.96。  
2. 计算标准误：0.4 / √1000 ≈ 0.01265。  
3. 置信区间 = 2.5 ± 1.96 × 0.01265 ≈ 2.5 ± 0.0248，即约2.475至2.525。  
**易错提示**：注意区分总体标准差与样本标准差，本题直接给出标准差且样本量大，故使用Z值而非t值。

questions.question: An advantage of nonprobability sampling, as compared to probability sampling, is lower:
questions.explanation: The primary advantages of nonprobability sampling are lower cost and easier access to data, as compared to probability sampling. Nonprobability sampling relies more on the analyst's judgment, and because it typically results in a sample that is less random than probability sampling, it is subject to greater sampling error.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察非概率抽样与概率抽样的优缺点比较，重点在于理解两种抽样方法在成本、误差和主观性上的差异。

**解题步骤**：
1. 明确非概率抽样（如判断抽样）和概率抽样（如简单随机抽样）的核心区别。
2. 回忆非概率抽样的主要优点：成本通常更低，数据更容易获得。
3. 回忆非概率抽样的主要缺点：更依赖分析师的判断（主观性更强），且样本随机性较低，因此抽样误差通常更大。
4. 根据题目要求“非概率抽样相比概率抽样的一个优势是更低的……”，结合步骤2和3，判断“成本”是符合题意的优势。

**易错提示**：不要将非概率抽样的缺点（如更高的抽样误差、更强的判断依赖）误认为是其优势。

questions.question: The average annual return over 20 years for a sector of mutual funds, calculated for the population of funds in that sector that have 20 years of performance history, isost likely to:

options.A: fairly state returns for the fund sector.
options.B: understate returns for the fund sector.
options.C: overstate returns for the fund sector.

questions.explanation: A sample suffers from survivorship bias if only surviving funds are captured in the data. Funds that cease to exist (due to poor performance) are excluded. This results in an average that overstates the annual return an investor in the sector could actually have expected to earn over the period.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察生存偏差（survivorship bias）对投资回报率计算的影响，特别是仅使用存续基金数据会导致高估平均回报。

**解题步骤**：
1. 识别题目场景：计算某行业共同基金20年平均年回报时，只纳入了拥有20年完整业绩历史的基金（即存续至今的基金）。
2. 理解偏差影响：业绩差而倒闭或合并的基金（通常回报较低）被排除在样本之外，导致样本仅包含“幸存者”。
3. 得出结论：因此，计算出的平均回报会高于投资者在该时期内实际可能获得的预期回报，即高估了行业回报。

**易错提示**：容易误选“公平反映”或“低估”，需明确生存偏差会导致回报被系统性高估。

questions.question: Sampling error can be defined as:

options.A: rejecting the null hypothesis when it is true. the difference between a sample statistic and its corresponding population
options.C: the standard deviation of a sampling distribution of the sample means.

questions.explanation: This is the definition.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：抽样误差的定义，即样本统计量与总体参数之间的差异。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 明确抽样误差的概念：它是由抽样随机性导致的样本结果与总体真值之间的偏差。  
2. 对比选项：A 选项直接给出了抽样误差的标准定义；B 选项不完整且表述割裂；C 选项描述的是样本均值的标准差（即标准误），而非抽样误差本身。  
**易错提示**：注意区分抽样误差（sample error）与标准误（standard error），后者是抽样分布的标准差。

questions.question: Shawn Choate wants to choose a variable of study that has the most desirable statistical properties. The statistic he is presently considering has the following characteristics: • The expected value of the sample mean is equal to the population mean. • The variance of the sampling distribution is smaller than that for other estimators of the parameter. • As the sample size increases, the standard error of the sample mean increases and the sampling distribution is centered more closely on the mean. Choate's estimator is:
questions.explanation: The estimator is unbiased because the expected value of the sample mean is equal to the population mean. The estimator is efficient because the variance of the sampling distribution is smaller than that for other estimators of the parameter. The estimator is not consistent. To be consistent, as the sample size increases, the standard error of the sample mean must decrease.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察统计估计量的三个性质：无偏性（unbiased）、有效性（efficient）和一致性（consistent）的定义。

**解题步骤**：
1. 根据题干第一点“样本均值的期望等于总体均值”，这符合无偏性（unbiased）的定义。
2. 根据第二点“抽样分布的方差小于其他估计量的方差”，这符合有效性（efficient）的定义。
3. 根据第三点“随着样本量增加，标准误增大”，这与一致性（consistent）的要求（样本量增大时标准误减小）相反，因此该估计量不具有一致性。

**易错提示**：注意一致性要求样本量增大时标准误减小，而题干描述相反，容易误选包含“consistent”的选项。

questions.question: A sample of size n = 25 is selected from a normal population. This sample has a mean of 15 and a sample variance of 4. What is the standard error of the sample mean?
questions.explanation: The standard error of the sample mean is estimated by dividing the standard deviation of the sample by the square root of the sample size. The standard deviation of the sample is calculated by taking the positive square root of the sample variance 42 = 2. Applying the formula: Sx= 5/ n1/2 = 21(25)1/2=215 = 0.4.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察样本均值的标准误（standard error of the sample mean）的计算公式。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 已知样本方差为4，计算样本标准差：√4 = 2。  
2. 样本均值的标准误公式为：样本标准差 / √样本容量。  
3. 代入数据：2 / √25 = 2 / 5 = 0.4。  
**易错提示**：注意区分总体标准差和样本标准差，本题直接使用样本方差开方得到样本标准差即可。

questions.question: Suppose the mean debt/equity ratio of the population of all banks in the United States is 20 and the population variance is 25. A banking industry analyst uses a computer program to select a random sample of 50 banks from this population and compute the sample mean. The program repeats this exercise 1000 times and computes the sample mean each time. According to the central limit theorem, the sampling distribution of the 1000 sample means will be approximately normal if the population of bank debt/equity ratios has:

options.A: a Student's t-distribution, because the sample size is greater than 30.
options.C: a normal distribution, because the sample is random.

questions.explanation: The central limit theorem tells us that for a population with a mean u and a finite variance or, the sampling distribution of the sample means of all possible samples of size will be approximately normally distributed with a mean equal to u and a variance equal to2/n, no matter the distribution of the populationassuming a large sample size.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：中心极限定理（CLT）的核心条件——无论总体分布形态如何，只要样本量足够大，样本均值的抽样分布近似正态分布。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确认题目背景：总体均值=20，方差=25，每次抽取样本量n=50，重复抽样1000次得到样本均值的分布。  
2. 根据中心极限定理，当样本量较大（通常n≥30）时，样本均值的抽样分布近似正态分布，且该结论不依赖于总体分布的具体形态。  
3. 因此，无论总体分布是t分布、正态分布或其他任意分布，只要样本量足够大，抽样分布都近似正态。  
**易错提示**：不要误认为总体必须服从正态分布或t分布，中心极限定理的关键是样本量足够大，与总体分布形态无关。

questions.question: From a population of 5,000 observations, a sample of n = 100 is selected. Calculate the standard error of the sample mean if the population variance is 2500.
questions.explanation: The standard error of the sample mean = population standard deviation xn. If the population variance is 2500, then the standard deviation is/2500. Therefore, the standard error isv2500 / V100 = 5.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察样本均值的标准误（standard error of the sample mean）的计算公式，即总体标准差除以样本量的平方根。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 已知总体方差为2500，则总体标准差为√2500 = 50。  
2. 样本量n = 100，样本均值的标准误公式为：总体标准差 / √n。  
3. 代入计算：50 / √100 = 50 / 10 = 5。  
**易错提示**：注意区分总体方差和总体标准差，计算标准误时使用的是总体标准差，且分母是样本量的平方根。

questions.question: Which of the following is/east likelya step in stratified random sampling?

options.A: The population is divided into strata based on some classification scheme.
options.B: The size of each sub-sample is selected to be the same across strata.
options.C: The sub-samples are pooled to create the complete sample.

questions.explanation: In stratified random sampling we first divide the population into subgroups, called strata, based on some classification scheme. Then we randomly select a sample from each stratum and pool the results. The size of the samples from each strata is based on the relative size of the strata relative to the population and are not necessarily the same across strata.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察分层随机抽样（stratified random sampling）的基本步骤，重点在于理解各层样本量的确定方式。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 分层随机抽样的第一步是将总体划分为不同的层（strata），这对应选项A。  
2. 第二步是从每层中随机抽取样本，但每层的样本量通常按该层在总体中的比例确定，而不是在各层中抽取相同数量的样本，因此选项B的描述不正确。  
3. 最后将各层的样本合并成总样本，这对应选项C。  
**易错提示**：注意分层抽样中每层样本量通常与层的大小成比例，而不是简单相等。

questions.question: A nursery sells trees of different types and heights. Suppose that 75 trees chosen at random are sold for planting at City Hall. These 75 trees average 60 inches in height with a standard deviation of 16 inches. Using this information, construct a 95% confidence interval for the mean height of all trees in the nursery.
questions.explanation: Because the sample size is sufficiently large, we can use the-statistic. A 95% confidence level is constructed by taking the sample mean and adding and subtracting the product of the z-statistic reliability factor (Za/2) times the standard error of the sample mean: x ‡ 7/2 × (s / n| /2) = 60 + (1.96) × (16 / 75/2) = 60 + (1.96) × (16 / 8.6603) = 60 + (1.96) × (1.85).
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察大样本下总体均值的置信区间构造，需使用z统计量和标准误公式。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确认样本量足够大（n=75），适用z统计量，95%置信水平对应关键值z=1.96。  
2. 计算标准误：标准误 = 样本标准差 / √样本量 = 16 / √75 ≈ 1.85。  
3. 构建置信区间：样本均值 ± z值 × 标准误 = 60 ± 1.96 × 1.85。  
**易错提示**：注意区分总体标准差（未知时用样本标准差）和标准误，避免直接使用样本标准差代替标准误。

questions.question: A scientist working for a pharmaceutical company tries many models using the same data before reporting the one that shows that the given drug has no serious side effects. The scientist's results aremost likelyto exhibit:
questions.explanation: Data snooping bias can result when the same data is used with different methods until the desired results are obtained.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察数据挖掘偏差（data snooping bias）的定义，即反复使用同一数据集测试不同模型直至得到期望结果所导致的偏差。

**解题步骤**：
1. 识别题干关键信息：科学家使用相同数据尝试多个模型，最终报告了显示药物无严重副作用的模型。
2. 将行为与偏差类型对应：反复用同一数据测试不同模型以得到特定结论，正是数据挖掘偏差的典型表现。
3. 排除其他选项：前瞻性偏差（B）涉及使用未来信息；样本选择偏差（C）涉及样本非随机，均不符合题意。

**易错提示**：注意区分数据挖掘偏差与样本选择偏差，前者强调对同一数据的反复挖掘，后者强调样本本身不具代表性。

questions.question: The practice of repeatedly using the same database to search for patterns until one is found is most likelyto result in:
questions.explanation: The practice of data snooping involves repeatedly analyzing the same data in the hope of detecting a pattern. Data snooping bias may result because some number of apparently significant relationships are likely to appear by chance. Look-ahead bias occurs by using information that is not available or known in the analysis period. An example is back testing a trading strategy that uses information in year-end accounts to 31st December 2019 to assist trading in the first week on January. This would not be possible as the financial statements are released several weeks after the year-end. Sample selection bias occurs when certain information is excluded from a sample due to lack of availability. The sample will, therefore, not be a random one (i.e., where each member of the population has an equal likelihood of being selected).
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察数据挖掘偏差（data snooping bias）的定义，区分三种常见的数据偏差类型。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 识别题干关键词：“反复使用同一数据库搜索模式直到找到为止”。  
2. 对应偏差类型：数据挖掘偏差指因反复测试数据而偶然发现虚假模式的问题。  
3. 排除干扰项：前瞻性偏差涉及使用未来信息；样本选择偏差源于样本非随机。  
**易错提示**：注意区分数据挖掘偏差与前瞻性偏差，后者强调使用了回测时不可得的信息。

questions.question: Student's t-Distribution Level of Significance for One-Tailed Test 0.005 0.0005 df 0.100 0.050 0.025 0.01 Level of Significance for Two-Tailed Test 0.001 df 0.20 0.05 0.02 0.10 0.01 3.646 1.697 2.042 2.457 2.750 30 1.310 3.551 1.684 40 1.303 2.021 2.423| 2.704 3.460 2.000 2.390| 2.660 60 1.296 1.671 3.373 1.658 120 1.289 |1.980 2.358 2.617 Based on Student's t-distribution, the 95% confidence interval for the population mean based on a sample of 40 interest rates with a sample mean of 4% and a sample standard deviation of 15% is closest to:
questions.explanation: The standard error for the mean = s/(n9.5 = 15%/(40)0.5 = 2.372%. The critical value from the t-table should be based on 40 - 1 = 39 df. Since the standard tables do not provide the critical value for 39 df the closest available value is for 40 df. This leaves us with an approximate confidence interval. Based on 95% confidence and df = 40, the critical t-value is 2.021. Therefore the 95% confidence interval is approximately: 4% ‡ 2.021(2.372) or 4% + 4.794% or -0.794% to 8.794%.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察如何利用t分布构建总体均值的置信区间，涉及标准误计算、自由度确定和临界t值查表。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 计算标准误：样本标准差除以样本量的平方根，即 15% / √40 ≈ 2.372%。  
2. 确定自由度（df = n-1 = 39），查t表得临界值（本题使用df=40近似，双尾95%对应t=2.021）。  
3. 计算置信区间：样本均值 ± t值 × 标准误，即 4% ± 2.021 × 2.372% ≈ 4% ± 4.794%，得到区间 [-0.794%, 8.794%]。  
**易错提示**：注意自由度不足时需用近似值，且置信区间为双尾，需查双尾显著性水平对应的t值。

questions.question: Student's t-Distribution Level of Significance for One-Tailed Test 0.005 0.0005 df 0.100 0.025 0.050 0.01 Level of Significance for Two-Tailed Test 0.001 df 0.02 0.20 0.10 0.05 0.01 3.551 1.684 2.021 2.423| 2.704 1.303 40 3.460 1.296 2.000 1.671 2.390 2.660 60 3.373 1.658 120 1.289 1.980 2.358 2.617 The average salary for a sample of 61 CFA charterholders with 10 years of experience is $200,000, and the sample standard deviation is $80,000. Assume the population is normally distributed. Which of the following is a 99% confidence interval for the population mean salary of CFA charterholders with 10 years of experience?
questions.explanation: If the distribution of the population isnormal, but we don't knowthe population variance, we can use the Student's t-distribution to construct a confidence interval. Because there are 61 observations, the degrees of freedom are 60. From the student's t table, we can determine that the reliability factor for t/2, or to.005, is 2.660. Then the 99% confidence interval is $200,000 ‡ 2.660($80,000 /61) or $200,000 ‡ 2.660 x $10,243, or $200,000 + $27,246.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察在总体方差未知、总体服从正态分布时，使用t分布构建总体均值的置信区间。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确定自由度 df = n - 1 = 61 - 1 = 60，置信水平 99% 对应双尾显著性水平 α = 0.01，单尾 α/2 = 0.005。  
2. 查 t 分布表（df=60，单尾 0.005），得关键值 t = 2.660。  
3. 计算标准误 = $80,000 / √61 ≈ $10,243，边际误差 = 2.660 × $10,243 ≈ $27,246，得到区间 $200,000 ± $27,246。  
**易错提示**：注意区分单尾与双尾检验对应的显著性水平，并正确查表获取 t 关键值。

questions.question: A sample of 25 junior financial analysts gives a mean salary (in thousands) of 60. Assume the population variance is known to be 100. A 90% confidence interval for the mean starting salary of junior financial analysts ismost accurately constructed as:
questions.explanation: Because we can compute the population standard deviation, we use the z-statistic. A 90% confidence level is constructed by taking the population mean and adding and subtracting the product of the z-statistic reliability (7/2) factor times the known standard deviation of the population divided by the square root of the sample size (note that the population variance is given and its positive square root is the standard deviation of the population): x + Zai2 × (0 / n'/2) = 60 +/- 1.645 × (1001/2 / 25'/2) = 60 +/- 1.645 × (10 / 5) = 60 +/- 1.645 × 2.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：已知总体方差时，用 z 统计量构建总体均值的置信区间。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确定使用 z 统计量（总体方差已知），90% 置信水平对应关键值 z₀.₀₅ = 1.645。  
2. 计算标准误：总体标准差 σ = √100 = 10，样本容量 n = 25，标准误 = σ/√n = 10/5 = 2。  
3. 置信区间公式：样本均值 ± z × 标准误 = 60 ± 1.645 × 2。  
**易错提示**：注意区分总体方差与样本方差，已知总体方差时用 z 统计量而非 t 统计量。

questions.question: Student's t-Distribution Level of Significance for One-Tailed Test 0.100 0.050 0.025 0.01 0.005 0.0005 df Level of Significance for Two-Tailed Test 0.001 0.20 df 0.10 0.05 0.02 0.01 3.551 40 1.303 1.684 2.021 2.423 2.704 3.460 1.671 1.296 2.000 2.390 2.660 60 120 1.289 1.658 1.980 2.358 2.617 3.373 The approximate 99% confidence interval for the population mean based on a sample of 60 returns with a mean of 7% and a sample standard deviation of 25% islosestto:
questions.explanation: The standard error for the mean = s / (n9.5 = 25% / (60)0.5 = 3.227%. The critical value from the t-table should be based on 60 - 1 = 59 df. Since the standard tables do not provide the critical value for 59 df the closest available value is for 60 df. This leaves us with an approximate confidence interval. Based on 99% confidence and df = 60, the critical t-value is 2.660. Therefore the 99% confidence interval is approximately: 7% ‡ 2.660(3.227) or 7% ‡ 8.584% or -1.584% to 15.584%. If you use a z-statistic, the confidence interval is 7% ‡ 2.58(3.227) = -1.326% to 15.326%, which is closest to the correct choice.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察利用t分布构建总体均值的置信区间，涉及标准误计算、自由度确定及临界t值查表。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 计算标准误：样本标准差/√n = 25%/√60 ≈ 3.227%。  
2. 确定自由度：df = n-1 = 59，查t表时取最接近的df=60，对应99%置信水平（双尾0.01）的临界t值为2.660。  
3. 计算置信区间：7% ± 2.660 × 3.227% ≈ 7% ± 8.584%，即区间为-1.584% 到 15.584%。  
**易错提示**：注意当自由度在表中无法直接查到时应取最接近值，勿误用z值或选错自由度。

questions.question: An analyst is asked to select a sample of securities from those included in a broad-based index that can be expected to have the same return as the index while preserving the key risk exposures of the index. The analyst shouldmost appropriatelyuse:
questions.explanation: Stratified random sampling is used to preserve characteristics of an underlying dataset.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察抽样方法的选择，特别是分层随机抽样在构建与指数风险暴露相匹配的样本时的应用。

**解题步骤**：
1. 明确目标：题目要求从广泛指数中选取样本，使样本与指数具有相同回报，并**保留指数的关键风险暴露**。
2. 分析选项：简单随机抽样无法保证样本与总体（指数）的风险特征一致；约束随机抽样通常用于满足特定单一约束（如市值）；分层随机抽样则先将总体按关键特征（如行业、市值）分层，再从各层中抽样，能有效保留总体的结构特征。
3. 做出选择：为保留指数的关键风险暴露（即其结构性特征），应选择分层随机抽样。

**易错提示**：注意区分“约束随机抽样”常用于满足单一约束条件，而“保留关键风险暴露”需要复制指数的多维度结构，这正是分层抽样的核心优势。

questions.question: Which technique for estimating the standard error of the sample mean involves calculating multiple means from the same sample, each with one observation removed from the sample?
questions.explanation: The jackknife technique involves calculating the standard deviation of the means from samples, each of which is calculated with a different observation removed from the original sample. The bootstrap method involves drawing multiple random samples from a dataset and calculating the standard deviation of those sample means. Standard error based on the standard deviation of a single sample is estimated by dividing the sample standard deviation by the square root of the sample size.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察Jackknife与Bootstrap两种估计标准误方法的区别。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 理解题干核心：题干描述的方法是“从同一个样本中多次计算均值，每次计算时移除一个不同的观测值”。  
2. 对比选项：A) Jackknife 正是通过依次剔除一个观测值来生成多个子样本并计算均值的标准误；B) Bootstrap 是通过有放回地重复抽样生成新样本；C) 样本方差是直接计算样本离散度的统计量。  
3. 匹配描述：题干描述与Jackknife方法的操作完全一致。  
**易错提示**：注意区分Jackknife（依次剔除）和Bootstrap（有放回重抽样）的核心操作差异。

questions.question: An efficient estimator ismost accuratelydescribed as one that:

options.A: has an expected value equal to the parameter it is estimating.
options.B: becomes more accurate as the sample size increases. has a sampling distribution with a smaller variance than that of all other unbiased estimators of the parameter.

questions.explanation: An estimator is efficient if the variance of its sampling distribution is smaller than that of all other unbiased estimators of the parameter. Anunbiased estimator has an expectea value equal to the parameter it is estimating. Aconsistentestimator becomes more accurate as the sample size increases.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察统计推断中三种估计量性质（无偏性、一致性、有效性）的定义区分。

**解题步骤**：
1. 明确题干核心词“efficient estimator”（有效估计量）的准确定义。
2. 回顾各选项对应的概念：A项描述的是“unbiased estimator”（无偏估计量）；B项描述的是“consistent estimator”（一致估计量）；C项描述的是“efficient estimator”（有效估计量）。
3. 将题干与选项定义精确匹配，C项为有效估计量的标准定义。

**易错提示**：容易混淆无偏性、有效性和一致性这三个核心概念的定义。

questions.question: In a confidence interval for the mean of a normally distributed population with a sample size of 25, it is least likelythat:

options.A: a t-distributed test statistic is appropriate if the population variance is unknow ×
options.B: a z-distributed test statistic is appropriate if the population variance is known. ×

questions.explanation: No test statistic is available when sampling from anon-normallydistributed population. If a normallydistributed population has a known variance, az-test is appropriate, even with a small sample, and if its population variance is unknown, d-statistic is appropriate with a small sample.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察在正态分布总体下，样本均值的置信区间构造中检验统计量的选择条件。

**解题步骤**：
1.  确认题目背景：总体服从正态分布，样本量为25（小样本）。
2.  分析各选项：
    *   选项A：若总体方差未知，应使用t分布统计量，此说法正确。
    *   选项B：若总体方差已知，应使用z分布统计量，此说法正确。
    *   选项C：声称“没有可用的检验统计量”，这与正态总体的前提矛盾，因为无论方差已知（用z）或未知（用t），都有对应的统计量。
3.  结论：选项C的描述最不可能成立，为正确答案。

**易错提示**：注意区分总体分布形态（本题为“正态分布”）与方差是否已知，这是选择z统计量或t统计量的关键。

questions.question: If the number of offspring for females of a certain mammalian species has a mean of 16.4 and a standard deviation of 3.2, what will be the standard error of the sample mean for a survey of 25 females of the species?
questions.explanation: The standard error of the sample mean when the standard deviation of the population is known is equal to the standard deviation of the population divided by the square root of the sample size. In this case, 3.2 /\25 = 0.64. It is a measure of how much the sample mean is likely to deviate from the population mean. The larger the sample selected, the lower the standard error, and so the less the sample mean will deviate from the true population mean.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察已知总体标准差时，样本均值的标准误（standard error of the sample mean）的计算公式。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确认公式：标准误 = 总体标准差 / √样本容量。  
2. 代入数值：总体标准差 = 3.2，样本容量 = 25，√25 = 5。  
3. 计算：3.2 / 5 = 0.64。  
**易错提示**：注意不要误用样本标准差或忘记对样本容量开平方。

questions.question: An advantage of the bootstrap method of estimating the standard error of sample means, compared to estimating it based on a sample variance, is that the bootstrap method:

options.B: only requires one sample to be taken.
options.C: can be applied to complex statistics.

questions.explanation: Calculating the standard error of sample means based on a single sample variance is most appropriate when the sample is unbiased and the population is approximately normally distributed. When these conditions do not hold, the bootstrap method may be more appropriate. This method is more computationally demanding in that it requires the analyst to calculate the means of multiple samples from the full dataset.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察bootstrap方法在估计样本均值标准误时的优势，特别是与传统基于样本方差的方法相比的适用场景。

**解题步骤**：
1. 理解传统方法：基于样本方差估计标准误通常要求样本无偏且总体近似服从正态分布。
2. 理解bootstrap方法：通过从原始数据集中有放回地重复抽样，构建多个重抽样样本并计算其统计量（如均值），进而估计标准误。
3. 比较优势：bootstrap不依赖于严格的分布假设，适用于更复杂的统计量估计，而传统方法在这些情况下可能不适用。

**易错提示**：注意bootstrap方法计算量通常更大（需要多次重抽样），而非更小。

questions.question: If the true mean of a population is 16.62, according to the central limit theorem, the mean of the distribution of sample means, for all possible sample sizes n will be:
questions.explanation: According to the central limit theorem, the mean of the distribution of sample means will be equal to the population mean. n > 30 is only required for distributions of sample means to approach normal distribution.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：中心极限定理（CLT）关于样本均值分布的均值性质。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 中心极限定理指出，无论样本容量大小，样本均值的分布的均值等于总体均值。  
2. 题目中总体均值为16.62，因此样本均值分布的均值也是16.62。  
3. 选项A涉及标准差计算，选项B混淆了均值性质与分布近似正态的条件。  
**易错提示**：注意区分样本均值分布的均值性质与分布形态近似正态所需的条件（通常n≥30）。

questions.question: To test the hypothesis that actively managed international equities mutual funds outperformed an appropriate benchmark index, an analyst selects all of the current international equities funds that have been in existence for at least 10 years. His test results will most likelybe subject to:
questions.explanation: When constructing samples, researchers must be careful not to include just survivors (e.g., surviving companies, mutual funds, or investment newsletters). Since survivors tend to be those that have done well (by skill or chance), funds that have 10-year track records will exhibit performance histories with upward bias—mutual fund companies regularly discontinue funds with poor performance histories or roll their assets into better performing funds. Time period bias occurs when the period chosen is so short that it shows relationships that are unlikely to recur, or so long that it includes fundamental changes in the relationship being observed. A 10-year period typically includes a full economic cycle and is likely to be appropriate for this test. Look-ahead bias is present if the test relates a variable to data that were not available at the points in time when that variable's outcomes were observed.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察抽样偏差中的生存偏差（survivorship bias）概念，即仅使用存续样本导致结果高估。

**解题步骤**：
1. 识别题干关键信息：分析师选取“当前已存在至少10年”的国际股票基金作为样本。
2. 分析潜在偏差：仅选取现存基金，忽略了期间因业绩不佳而被清盘或合并的基金，导致样本只包含“幸存者”，业绩表现被高估。
3. 匹配选项：生存偏差（survivorship bias）直接对应此问题；时间周期偏差（time period bias）通常涉及周期选择不当，前瞻性偏差（look-ahead bias）涉及使用未来信息，均不适用。

**易错提示**：注意区分“生存偏差”与“时间周期偏差”——后者关注研究时段长短是否合理，而非样本是否包含已消失对象。

questions.question: The central limit theorem concerns the sampling distribution of the:
questions.explanation: The central limit theorem tells us that for a population with a mean m and a finite variance o2, the sampling distribution of thesample meansof all possible samples of size n will approach a normal distribution with a mean equal tou and a variance equal too? / nas n gets large.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：中心极限定理（Central Limit Theorem）的定义，即描述哪个统计量的抽样分布性质。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 中心极限定理的核心内容是：当样本容量足够大时，样本均值的抽样分布近似服从正态分布。  
2. 因此，该定理关注的是样本均值（sample mean）的分布特性，而非总体均值或样本标准差。  
**易错提示**：注意区分“总体均值”和“样本均值的分布”，中心极限定理是针对后者。

questions.question: Which of the following would result in a wider confidence interval? A:
questions.explanation: A higher degree of confidence (e.g. 99% instead of 95%) would require a higher reliability factor (2.575 instead of 1.96 assuming a normal distribution). A wider confidence interval corresponds to a lower alpha significance level and the point estimate does not affect the width of the confidence interval.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：置信区间的宽度与置信水平、显著性水平（α）的关系。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 置信区间宽度由“点估计值 ± 关键值 × 标准误”决定，关键值取决于置信水平。  
2. 置信水平越高（如99%对比95%），关键值越大，区间越宽。  
3. 显著性水平α = 1 - 置信水平，因此更高的置信水平对应更低的α，而非更高的α。  
**易错提示**：注意区分置信水平与显著性水平α，更高的α（如0.1对比0.05）对应更低的置信水平，区间更窄。

questions.question: Melissa Cyprus, CFA, is conducting an analysis of inventory management practices in the retail industry. She assumes the population cross-sectional standard deviation of inventory turnover ratios is 20. How large a random sample should she gather in order to ensure a standard error of the sample mean of 4?
questions.explanation: Given the population standard deviation and the standard error of the sample mean, you can solve for the sample size. Because the standard error of the sample mean equals the standard deviation of the population divided by the square root of the sample size, 4 = 20 / n'12, 5o n'/2 = 5, 50 n = 25.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：样本均值的标准误公式（标准误 = 总体标准差 / √样本容量），以及如何通过已知标准误反求样本容量。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 根据标准误公式：标准误 = σ / √n，代入已知值：4 = 20 / √n。  
2. 解方程：√n = 20 / 4 = 5。  
3. 两边平方得样本容量 n = 5² = 25。  
**易错提示**：注意不要忘记对 √n 的结果进行平方来得到最终的样本容量 n。

questions.question: The central limit theorem states that, for any distribution, as gets larger, the sampling distribution:
questions.explanation: As n gets larger, the variance of the distribution of sample means is reduced, and the distribution of sample means approximates a normal distribution.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：中心极限定理（CLT）的核心结论：随着样本容量增大，样本均值的抽样分布趋近正态分布。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 理解中心极限定理的定义：无论总体分布形态如何，当样本容量足够大时，样本均值的抽样分布近似服从正态分布。  
2. 比较选项：A 描述“趋近正态分布”符合定理；B 描述“趋近均值”是误解；C 描述“变得更大”与定理无关。  
3. 选择正确表述：根据定理内容，应选 A。  
**易错提示**：注意中心极限定理针对的是样本均值的分布，而非样本数据本身或总体分布。

questions.question: A study finds that stocks with low price-to-book-value ratios, using end-of-year stock prices and book values per share, have positive abnormal returns in January on average. This study most likelysuffers from:
questions.explanation: Look-ahead bias occurs when a study examines an effect based on information that was not yet available at the time being tested.
