options.A: should revise the recommendation based on this new information. should report the new information to her immediate supervisor so that they Ci
options.B: determine whether or not the marketing department should send out the report as written. may send out the report as written as long as a follow up is disseminated withi
options.C: a reasonable amount of time reflecting the changes in management.

questions.explanation: This question is related to Standard V(B) which states that CFA Institute members should use reasonable judgment regarding the inclusion or exclusion of relevant factors in research reports. The change in management was a relevant factor and must be disclosed before dissemination.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中V(B)条款（与客户和潜在客户沟通）的应用，要求分析师在研究报告中合理判断并披露重要信息。

**解题步骤**：
1.  识别关键事实：Black在报告提交后，才获知关于目标公司管理层变动的重大新信息。
2.  应用准则原则：根据V(B)条款，分析师有责任确保研究报告包含所有重要相关因素，并在传播前进行合理判断。
3.  确定正确行动：新信息直接影响其“强力买入”评级的核心依据（稳固的管理层），因此必须立即修正报告，确保信息准确完整后再传播。

**易错提示**：不要误以为可以先行发布报告再补充更新，准则要求必须在传播前确保报告的完整性。

questions.question: An analyst writes a report and includes the forecasts of an econometric model developed by the firm's research department. The analyst identifies the source of the forecast and includes all the relevant statistics concerning the model. With respect to diligence and reasonable basis, the analyst has:

options.A: violated the Standards by not evaluating the model independently.
options.C: violated the Standards by relying on model forecasts.

questions.explanation: Members and candidates may reasonably rely on their firms' research departments for analysis and remain in compliance with Standard V(A) Diligence and Reasonable Basis.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业准则中V(A)条款（勤勉与合理依据）的应用，特别是关于使用公司内部研究成果时的合规要求。

**解题步骤**：
1.  确认分析师行为：使用了公司研究部门开发的模型预测，并注明了来源和关键统计数据。
2.  根据准则V(A)：成员和候选人可以合理地依赖公司研究部门的分析，只要该部门具备可靠性和专业性。
3.  判断合规性：分析师已披露来源并提供了相关信息，符合“合理依据”的要求，因此没有违反准则。

**易错提示**：易错选A，误以为分析师必须对所有外部或内部模型进行独立验证，但准则允许合理依赖公司内部可靠部门的研究成果。

questions.question: An analyst has several groups of clients who are categorized according to their specific needs. Compared to research reports distributed to all of the clients, reports for a specific group:

options.A: will definitely include more basic facts.
options.B: may generally exclude more basic facts.
options.C: will not be allowed because it violates the Standard I|(B), Fair Dealing.

questions.explanation: According to Standard V(B), an analyst can use reasonable judgment regarding the exclusion of some facts and should include more basic facts for reports to wider audiences. The key issue is that analysts should tailor their reports to the intended audience.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业伦理准则V(B)（与客户沟通）中关于研究报告内容应根据受众调整的要求。

**解题步骤**：
1. 根据准则V(B)，分析师在准备研究报告时，应运用合理判断，考虑受众的特定需求和背景。
2. 面向全体客户的报告，受众广泛、背景多样，因此需要包含更多基础事实。
3. 面向特定客户群体的报告，由于受众背景和需求更集中、更专业，可以合理省略一些基础事实，使报告更具针对性。

**易错提示**：注意准则并未禁止为不同群体准备差异化报告，关键在于确保公平对待所有客户，而非提供完全相同的报告内容。

questions.question: Several years ago, Hilton and Ross, a full service investment firm, managed the initial public offering of eCom, Inc. Now, eCom wants Hilton and Ross to underwrite its secondary public offering. A senior manager at Hilton and Ross asks Brent Whitman, CFA, one of its equity analysts, to write a favorable research report on eCom to help make the underwriting a success. Whitman conducts a thorough analysis of eCom and concludes that the company has serious problems that do not suggest a favorable financial outlook. Nevertheless, Whitman writes a favorable report because he is fearful of losing his job. Hilton and Ross publicly distribute a report that only contains a buy recommendation and a brief description of the basic characteristics of eCom. Whitman has violated: Both Standard I(B) Independence and Objectivity and Standard V(A) Diligence

options.C: Standard V(A) Diligence and Reasonable Basis only.

questions.explanation: Whitman violated Standard V(A) Diligence and Reasonable Basis because he did not have a reasonable and adequate basis for issuing a favorable recommendation. Whitman violated Standard |(B) Independence and Objectivity because he did not act independently in issuing his recommendation but instead was influenced by senior management at Hilton and Ross.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业伦理准则中关于分析师独立客观性（I(B)）以及研究分析的勤勉尽责与合理依据（V(A)）的适用场景。

**解题步骤**：
1.  首先，分析题干关键事实：分析师Whitman因害怕失业，违背自己的分析结论，撰写了有利的研究报告。
2.  其次，判断其行为与准则的关联：他因受到工作威胁的压力而扭曲了专业判断，这直接违反了 **Standard I(B) Independence and Objectivity**（独立性与客观性）。
3.  最后，评估研究报告本身：报告内容简略，且结论与分析过程相悖，缺乏充分的依据，这同时也违反了 **Standard V(A) Diligence and Reasonable Basis**（勤勉尽责与合理依据）。

**易错提示**：注意区分“受到压力而妥协”是独立客观性问题，而“报告缺乏依据”是勤勉尽责问题，两者在本案例中同时存在。

questions.question: Steven Wade, CFA, writes an investment newsletter focusing on high-tech companies, which he distributes by e-mail to paid subscribers. Wade does not gather any information about his clients' needs and circumstances. Wade has developed several complex valuation models that serve as the basis for his recommendations. Each month, his newsletter contains a list of "buy" and "sell" recommendations. He states that his recommendations are suitable for all types of portfolios and clients. Because of their proprietary nature, Wade does not disclose, except in general terms, the nature of his valuation models. He conducted numerous statistical tests of these models and they appear to have worked well in the past. In his newsletter, Wade claims that subscribers who follow his recommendations can expect to earn superior returns because of the past success of his models. Wade violated all of the following CFA Institute Standards of Professional Conduct EXCEPT:

options.C: Standard V(B), Communication with Clients and Prospective Clients.

questions.explanation: Wade did not violate Standard II|(B), Fair Dealing, because this situation does not indicate that he failed to deal fairly and objectively with all clients when disseminating his newsletter containing investment recommendations. Wade violated Standard V(B), Communication with Clients and Prospective Clients, because he failed to include all relevant factors behind his recommendations. Without providing the basis for his recommendations, clients cannot evaluate the limitations or the risks inherent in his recommendations. Wade violated Standard |(C), Misrepresentation, because his claims about gaining superior expected returns are misleading to potential investors.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察对CFA职业行为准则中“公平交易”、“与客户沟通”和“不当陈述”三个具体条款的理解和应用。

**解题步骤**：
1.  分析题干行为：Wade未了解客户情况，使用复杂且未充分披露的模型给出统一建议，并声称能获得超额回报。
2.  判断各选项是否违规：
    *   **不当陈述 (A)**：他声称模型过去成功且能带来“超额回报”，这构成了误导性陈述，违反了该准则。
    *   **与客户沟通 (C)**：他未向客户充分披露其复杂估值模型的具体依据，使客户无法评估建议的风险和局限，违反了该准则。
    *   **公平交易 (B)**：他的投资建议通过新闻稿统一分发给所有付费订阅者，没有信息表明他在订阅者之间存在不公平或区别对待的行为，因此**没有违反**该准则。
3.  根据题目要求，找出**没有违反**的准则，即选项B。

**易错提示**：需区分“对所有人提供相同信息”（可能涉及公平交易）与“提供的信息本身不充分或有误导性”（涉及沟通和不当陈述）之间的不同。

questions.question: Maggie McCarthy is an individual investment advisor who uses mutual funds for her clients. She typically chooses from a list of 40 funds that she has thoroughly researched. The Figgs, a married couple that are a client, asked her to consider the Boilermaker fund for their portfolio. McCarthy had not previously considered the fund because when she first conducted her research three years ago, Boilermaker was too small to be considered. However, the fund has now grown in value, and after doing thorough research on Boilermaker, she found the fund was by far the most outstanding large company value fund in her list of funds. She puts the fund in the Figgs' portfolio, and in all new clients' portfolios, but not in any of her other clients' portfolios. Her reasoning is that her existing clients were comfortable with their current holdings, and she did not want to risk disturbing their comfort. Has McCarthy violated any Standards? McCarthy has:

options.B: violated the Standards by not dealing fairly with clients. violated the Standards by not having a reasonable and adequate basis for making the recommendation.

questions.explanation: The fund should have been considered for the existing clients' portfolios. There may have been reasons not to add the fund to their portfolios, such as tax consequences or a lack of suitability, but disturbing their comfort is not sufficient.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中“公平对待客户”原则，要求投资建议应基于客户利益，而非主观偏好或便利性。

**解题步骤**：
1. 分析McCarthy的行为：她发现一只优质基金，但仅将其加入新客户及主动询问的Figgs夫妇的账户，未推荐给其他现有客户。
2. 判断理由是否合理：她以“不想打扰现有客户的舒适感”为由，但这并非基于客户最佳利益（如税收、适用性等）的专业判断。
3. 对照准则：此行为导致不同客户受到不公平对待，现有客户被剥夺了考虑更优投资机会的权利，违反了公平对待客户的原则。

**易错提示**：易误认为尊重客户现状不构成违规，但关键点在于未基于合理分析为客户提供更优选择，仅以“舒适”为由属于失职。

questions.question: An analyst finds a stock that has had a low beta given its historical return, but its total risk has been commensurate with its return. When writing a research report about the stock for clients with well-diversified portfolios, according to Standard V(B), Communication with Clients and Prospective Clients, the analyst needs to mention:

options.A: the relationship of the historical beta and return only.
options.B: both the historical beta and total risk and return.
options.C: the relationship of the historical total risk to return only.

questions.explanation: Using reasonable judgment, an analyst may exclude certain factors from research reports. Since the report will be delivered to clients with well-diversified portfolios, total risk is not as important as beta. Given that the total risk has been only commensurate with historical return, furthermore, then the analyst is not negligent by not mentioning it.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业伦理准则Standard V(B)中关于与客户沟通时，分析师应如何运用专业判断选择报告内容，特别是针对已充分分散投资的客户，相关风险指标（系统性风险 vs. 总风险）的披露重点。

**解题步骤**：
1. 识别关键背景：客户已持有充分分散化的投资组合，因此对他们而言，个股的总风险（非系统性风险）不重要，而系统性风险（由beta衡量）是关键。
2. 应用准则精神：Standard V(B)要求沟通清晰且不误导，但允许分析师运用合理判断，省略不重要的信息。
3. 结合题干信息：股票历史beta低但总风险与收益匹配。对于分散化客户，只需讨论beta与收益的关系（系统性风险与收益），无需强调总风险。

**易错提示**：易错选B，误以为需要披露所有信息，而忽略了客户背景（充分分散化）是解题关键，在此背景下总风险不相关。

questions.question: An analyst receives a research report from a colleague. The colleague's report has an elaborate table with performance data on publicly traded stocks. The colleague says the data in the table consists of measures provided by Standard & Poor's. The analyst finds the table a useful reference for a report she is writing. She uses several pieces of data from the table. The analyst is potentially in violation of:

options.A: no particular standard because this is appropriate activity.
options.B: Standard |(C), Misrepresentation, concerning the use of the work of others. Standard V(A), Diligence and Reasonable Basis, if she does not first verify the data in the table is accurate.

questions.explanation: Since the data in the table supposedly comes from Standard & Poor's, a recognized data source, the analyst does not have to cite the source of the data. However, the analyst needs to use reasonable care and verify that the data is accurate by going back to the source. Had the analyst printed the table prepared by her colleague without acknowledgement, the analyst would have violated Standard |(C), Misrepresentation.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业伦理准则中关于使用他人成果时的责任，重点涉及标准V(A)（勤勉与合理依据）和标准I(C)（不当陈述）。

**解题步骤**：
1. 判断情境核心：分析师使用了同事报告中声称来自标普的数据，但未自行核实数据准确性。
2. 分析准则适用性：由于数据来源（标普）是公认的，无需额外引用，但根据标准V(A)，分析师有责任勤勉尽责，确保所用数据准确，因此必须核实原始数据。
3. 排除其他选项：若直接使用同事制作的表格而未注明，则违反标准I(C)；但本题未提及此行为，故主要违反标准V(A)。

**易错提示**：易混淆“使用他人数据但未注明来源”（违反I(C)）与“使用未经验证的第三方数据”（违反V(A)）的情形。

questions.question: Victor Logan is a portfolio manager for McCoy Advisors, and Jack Brisco is the Director of Research for McCoy. Brisco has developed a proprietary model that has been thoroughly researched and is known throughout the industry as the McCoy model. The model is purely quantitative and screens stocks into buy, hold, and sell categories. The basic philosophy of the model is thoroughly explained to clients. Brisco frequently alters the model based on rigorous research—an aspect that is well explained to clients, although the specific alterations are not continually disclosed. Portfolio managers then make specific sector and security holding decisions, purchasing only securities that are indicated as "buys" by the model. Logan has conducted very thorough research on his own, using the same process that Brisco uses to validate his findings. Logan feels the model is missing some key elements that would further reduce the list of acceptable securities to purchase, however, Brisco has refused to look at Logan's research. Frustrated by this, Logan applies his own version of the model, with the justification that he is still only purchasing securities on the buy list. Because of the conflict with Brisco, he does not disclose the use of the model to anyone at McCoy or to clients. Which of the following statements regarding Logan and Brisco is CORRECT? Logan is: not violating the Standards by applying his version of the model, but is violatin;

options.A: the Standards by not disclosing it to clients. Brisco is not violating the Standards. violating the Standards by applying his version of the model and by not
options.B: disclosing it to clients. Brisco is not violating the Standards. violating the Standards by applying his version of the model and by not
options.C: disclosing it to clients. Brisco is violating the Standards by failing to consider Logan's research.

questions.explanation: Because the research is thoroughly conducted, and Logan has authority to make individual security selection decisions, Logan is not violating the Standards by applying his model. However, Logan is violating the Standard on communication with clients and prospective clients by excluding relevant factors of the investment process. The use of his model is an important aspect of the investment process and should be disclosed to clients. Brisco is not violating the Standards by not considering Logan's research.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题主要考查CFA职业行为准则中关于投资分析和客户沟通的要求，特别是对投资流程重大变更的披露义务。

**解题步骤**：
1.  判断Logan的行为：他有权进行个股选择，且其自行研究的模型仅用于进一步筛选“买入”名单，并未违背公司基本模型的核心原则，因此应用自己的模型不违反准则。
2.  判断Logan的披露义务：他使用的模型是投资流程的一个重要方面，这一变更未向公司或客户披露，违反了与客户沟通的准则。
3.  判断Brisco的行为：作为研究主管，他没有义务必须考虑或采纳下属Logan的研究建议，因此不违反准则。

**易错提示**：易混淆“有权进行独立判断”与“对投资流程的重大变更负有披露义务”这两个要点。

questions.question: In the preparation of a research report, a CFA Institute member may emphasize certain matters, touch briefly on others, and omit some altogether: provided that the analyst both has a reasonable basis and is unconstrained by

options.B: provided that the analyst has a reasonable basis for his or her actions.

questions.explanation: According to Standard V(B), the analyst must use reasonable judgment in identifying relevant factors when communicating with clients and prospects. The Mosaic theory does not apply here.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中关于研究报告准备的规定，特别是标准V(B)（沟通）中关于合理判断的要求。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 识别题目核心：研究报告可以强调某些内容、简要提及其他内容、甚至省略部分内容，但前提是什么。  
2. 根据准则标准V(B)，分析师在沟通时必须基于合理判断，确保有合理依据（reasonable basis）。  
3. 选项B明确要求“分析师的行为必须有合理依据”，符合准则规定，而马赛克理论（A）与此无关，绝对禁止（C）则不符合准则精神。  
**易错提示**：注意不要混淆马赛克理论与研究报告的合理省略，前者涉及信息收集方法，后者强调沟通时的合理判断。

questions.question: Referral fees a member must disclose to a prospective client include:

options.A: both fees a member receives and fees a member pays.
options.B: only fees a member pays to others for referrals.
options.C: only fees a member receives for referrals.

questions.explanation: Members and candidates must disclose all referral arrangements to their employer, clients, and prospective clients. (Module 71.8, LOS 71: VI(C))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业准则中关于推荐费（referral fees）的披露要求，重点在于需要披露的费用范围。

**解题步骤**：
1.  根据CFA职业行为准则，会员必须向雇主、客户和潜在客户披露所有推荐安排。
2.  这里的“所有推荐安排”包括会员因推荐他人而收到的费用，以及会员为获得推荐而支付给他人的费用。
3.  因此，披露范围同时包含收取和支付的推荐费。

**易错提示**：易错误地认为只需披露收取的费用或只需披露支付的费用，而实际上两者都必须披露。

questions.question: Lee Hurst, CFA, is an equity research analyst for a long-term investment fund. His annual bonus is linked to quarterly trading profits. Under a new policy, the quarterly assessment period is switched to a monthly assessment period. According to the Code and Standards, best practices dictate:

options.A: keeping the policy change private as a trade secret.
options.B: updating disclosures when the policy change is implemented. requiring Hurst to obtain permission from each client prior to implementation of the new policy.

questions.explanation: Standard VI(A) "Disclosures of Conflicts" recognizes this policy as a potential conflict of interest as members and candidates could be incentivized to favor short-term trading gains over long-term value creation. Best practices dictate updating disclosures when the policy change is implemented. The long-term investors should know how members and candidates are compensated, especially when there is the potential for conflicts of interest.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA道德准则中VI(A)披露利益冲突条款，要求识别薪酬政策变动可能引发的利益冲突及最佳披露实践。

**解题步骤**：
1. 识别题干核心：薪酬评估周期从季度改为月度，可能激励分析师追求短期交易利润，与基金长期投资目标产生潜在利益冲突。
2. 根据准则VI(A)：当发生可能影响客户利益的重大变动时，应及时向客户披露。
3. 匹配选项：B选项“在政策实施时更新披露”符合准则要求的最佳实践。

**易错提示**：注意不要混淆“披露义务”与“需逐一向客户事前取得许可”，后者并非准则强制要求。

questions.question: Will Lambert, CFA, is a financial analyst for Offshore Investments. He is preparing a purchase recommendation on Burch Corporation. According to the Standards of Professional Conduct, which of the following relationships with Burch is Lamberteast likelyrequired to disclose?

options.A: He has a material beneficial ownership of Burch through a family trust.
options.B: His wife owns 2,000 shares of Burch.
options.C: His son-in-law was formerly employed by Burch.

questions.explanation: Standard VI(A) Disclosure of Conflicts requires that Members and Candidates fully disclose all matters which may impair their independence or objectivity or interfere with their duties to their employer, clients and prospects. Beneficial ownership of shares in a firm on which a member is making investment recommendations is an example of such a matter.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中VI(A)利益冲突披露条款，重点在于判断哪些关系需要强制披露。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 根据准则VI(A)，分析师必须披露可能影响其独立性与客观性、或干扰其对客户/雇主责任的所有重大利益关系。  
2. 分析各选项：A（通过家族信托持有重大受益所有权）和B（配偶持有股票）均属于直接或间接经济利益，通常需要披露。  
3. C选项（女婿曾任职于该公司）属于非紧密的家庭关系且已终止雇佣，对当前独立性的影响较小，最可能无需强制披露。  
**易错提示**：注意区分“直系亲属”与“非直系亲属”，以及经济利益关系与非经济利益关系的披露要求差异。

questions.question: Ann Dunbar, a portfolio manager, wishes to buy stock of Knight Enterprises for her personal account and for clients. Knight is a thinly traded stock. Dunbar believes her own purchase is too small to affect the price but the purchase for clients is likely to increase the price. According to the Code and Standards, when may Dunbar buy the stock for her personal account?

options.A: At the same time she enters the buy order for her clients.
options.B: She may not buy the same stock that she buys for her clients.
options.C: After the buy order for her clients is executed.

questions.explanation: Standard VI(B) Priority of Transactions requires that transactions for clients take precedence over a personal transactions of a member or candidate. Members and candidates should not benefit personally from client transactions, as would occur in this case if the manager enters her personal trade at the same time as the trade for clients. The Standard does not prohibit members and candidates from investing in the same securities they recommend for clients. (Module 71.8, LOS 71.a, 71.c, 71.b)
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业准则中的VI(B)交易优先原则，要求客户交易优先于个人交易，避免个人从客户交易中获利。

**解题步骤**：
1. 识别题干核心：基金经理为自己和客户购买同一只交易清淡的股票，且客户的购买可能推高股价。
2. 应用准则VI(B)：客户交易必须优先于个人交易，且个人不得从客户交易中获利。
3. 判断选项：若同时下单（A），个人可能因客户推高股价而获利，违反准则；禁止购买同一股票（B）并非准则要求；只有在客户订单执行后（C）进行个人交易，才能确保客户优先且个人不提前获利，符合准则。

**易错提示**：易误选A，认为同时下单公平，但忽略了在交易清淡的股票中，大额客户订单可能立即影响价格，使个人同步订单不当获利。

questions.question: A firm produces regular proprietary research reports on various companies. According to Standard VI(B), Priority of Transactions, which of the following would be an "access person"?

options.A: A person working in the mail room.
options.B: A supervisory analyst who reviews all research reports prior to dissemination. An independent auditor with access to material, non-public information on a

questions.explanation: Persons with access to information during the normal preparation of research recommendations are subject to Standard VI(B). An independent auditor is not involved in the normal preparation of research recommendations.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察对准则 VI(B)（交易优先权）中“access person”（信息接触者）定义的理解，特别是哪些人员因参与研究报告的正常准备过程而受该准则约束。

**解题步骤**：
1.  根据准则 VI(B)，在研究报告的正常准备和发布过程中能够接触到相关信息的人员，属于“access person”。
2.  选项A（邮件收发室人员）通常不参与研究报告的准备过程。
3.  选项B（负责审核研究报告的监督分析师）直接参与研究报告发布前的审核流程，属于“access person”。选项C（独立审计师）虽能接触信息，但其工作不属于公司“研究报告的正常准备过程”，因此不受此准则约束。

**易错提示**：易将“能接触重大非公开信息”等同于“access person”，而忽略“在研究报告正常准备过程中”这一关键限定条件。

questions.question: Lance Tuipulotu, CFA, is a portfolio manager for an investment advisory firm. He plans to sell 10,000 shares of Park N'Wreck, Inc. to finance his daughter's new restaurant venture, but his firm recently upgraded the stock to "strong buy." In order to remain in compliance with Standard VI(B) "Priority of Transactions," Tuipulotu must:

options.A: notify his firm of his intention to sell the shares before selling the shares.
options.B: not sell the shares of Park N'Wreck. delay selling the shares until a firm client makes an offsetting purchase to avoi

questions.explanation: Standard VI(B) "Priority of Transactions" does not prohibit Tuipulotu from trading opposite the firm's recommendation, but he should notify his firm first. Note that if Tuipulotu were a research analyst covering Park N'Wreck, he may be prevented from selling the security if his firm claims compliance with the CFA Institute's Research Objectivity Standards. (Module 71.8, LOS 71: VI(B))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业伦理准则VI(B) "Priority of Transactions"（交易优先顺序）中，关于个人交易与公司推荐意见冲突时的合规要求。

**解题步骤**：
1.  识别核心冲突：基金经理计划卖出股票，但其公司近期将该股票评级上调为“强烈买入”。
2.  回顾准则关键规定：准则VI(B)并未完全禁止雇员进行与公司推荐意见相反的个人交易。
3.  确定合规动作：准则要求，在此类个人交易执行前，必须事先通知其雇主（公司），以获得批准或进行报备。

**易错提示**：易误认为个人交易必须完全服从公司推荐而选择禁止卖出，但准则的核心要求是事先披露而非绝对禁止。

questions.question: An analyst has been covering a particular firm for years. Recently, the analyst's uncle died and left the analyst a sizable position in the firm's stock. To comply with the Code and Standards, the analyst:

options.A: is not required to act because the analyst did not purchase the stock.
options.B: is required to disclose the ownership of the stock to his employer.
options.C: should divest the stock as soon as is practicable.

questions.explanation: The analyst is required to disclose the ownership of the stock to his employer by Standard VI(A) Disclosure of Conflicts. The analyst must also disclose the stock ownership in any subsequent coverage of the company. The Standard does not require or recommend that the analyst divest the stock. (Module 71.8, LOS 71: VI(A))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中关于利益冲突披露的要求，特别是标准VI(A)在持有被研究公司股票时的适用情况。

**解题步骤**：
1. 识别情境：分析师通过继承获得了其长期覆盖公司的股票，产生了潜在利益冲突。
2. 依据准则：根据标准VI(A)，分析师必须向雇主披露可能影响其独立性与客观性的所有利益冲突。
3. 判断合规动作：披露是必须的，但准则并未强制要求出售股票。

**易错提示**：不要误以为只有主动购买的股票才需要披露，或认为必须立即出售继承的股票。

questions.question: Member compliance on issues relating to corporate governance or to soft dollars is primarily addressed by the Standard concerning:

options.A: Disclosure of Conflicts to Clients and Prospects.

questions.explanation: Fiduciary duty on issues relating to corporate governance or to soft dollars is primarily addressed by Standard |I|(A), Loyalty, Prudence, and Care.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业伦理准则中，关于公司治理和软美元相关合规问题主要对应哪条准则。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 识别题干关键词“corporate governance”（公司治理）和“soft dollars”（软美元）。  
2. 回忆准则内容：公司治理和软美元问题涉及客户资产的审慎管理与忠诚义务，属于受托责任范畴。  
3. 对应至准则III(A) Loyalty, Prudence, and Care，该准则明确要求会员在管理客户资产时需尽责、审慎，并将客户利益置于首位。  
**易错提示**：易误选A（披露利益冲突），但公司治理和软美元问题的核心是履行受托责任，而非仅披露。

questions.question: An analyst routinely has the opportunity to offer his clients the opportunity to purchase "hot new issues." He tells his clients that he will distribute each issue equally among those interested, with himself included in the distribution. The clients do not object to this. With respect to Standard VI(B), Priority of Transactions, this:

options.A: cannot be a violation because the clients know of the practice and agree.
options.B: may be a violation because it is impossible to distribute hot new issues equally *
options.C: may be a violation despite the clients' approval.

questions.explanation: Just because the clients know of a practice does not make it right. The analyst must put the clients first. It is a violation for the analyst to participate in a "hot new issue" which can lower the allocation to any given client below what that client would prefer. This is tantamount to putting the analyst's interests ahead of the clients' interests.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA道德准则VI(B)交易优先权，重点在于客户知情同意是否豁免分析师参与热门新股分配的责任。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确认题干核心：分析师在客户知情且同意的情况下，将自己纳入热门新股分配名单。  
2. 根据准则VI(B)，客户交易必须始终优先于分析师个人交易，即使客户同意也不能豁免该原则。  
3. 分析师参与分配可能减少客户可获得份额，实质是将自身利益置于客户之前，构成潜在违规。  
**易错提示**：不要误以为客户同意即可豁免违规，准则的核心是客户利益绝对优先。

questions.question: Sean Jones places an order with his investment advisor Lisa Johnson, CFA, to buy 1,000 shares of Orkle Incorporated. Johnson's firm makes a market in Orkle and she executes the trade through her own firm. According to the Code and Standards, Johnson should:

options.A: contact her firm's compliance department before accepting the order.
options.B: disclose her firm's market making activities to Jones.
options.C: decline to execute trades in securities for which her firm makes a market.

questions.explanation: Standard VI(A) Disclosure of Conflicts states that broker-dealer market making activities must be disclosed to clients. (Module 71.8, LOS 71.a, 71.c, 71.b)
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中关于利益冲突披露的要求，特别是券商做市活动对客户的披露义务。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 识别情境：客户下单购买股票，而投资顾问所在公司是该股票的做市商，且交易通过本公司执行。  
2. 依据准则：根据准则VI(A)（利益冲突披露），券商做市活动必须向客户披露，以确保客户知情。  
3. 匹配选项：选项B直接对应披露要求，是必要且恰当的做法。  
**易错提示**：注意避免误认为必须拒绝交易或事先联系合规部门，披露是关键而非禁止。

questions.question: The Standard concerning referral fees is applicable to:

options.A: only considerations received for recommending products or services.
options.B: any consideration received or paid for recommending products or services.
options.C: only considerations paid for recommending products or services.

questions.explanation: Standard VI(C) Referral Fees requires members and candidates to disclose any consideration received or paid for a recommendation. (Module 71.8, LOS 71: VI(C))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中关于推荐费（Referral Fees）的适用情况，即标准VI(C)的适用范围。

**解题步骤**：
1. 回忆CFA职业行为准则标准VI(C)的核心要求。
2. 该标准规定，会员和考生必须披露因推荐产品或服务而**收到或支付**的任何报酬。
3. 对比选项，只有选项B（any consideration received or paid）完整准确地描述了这一要求。

**易错提示**：易错点在于只关注了“收到”或“支付”的单一方向，而标准要求同时涵盖两者。

questions.question: Standard VI(B), Priority of Transactions, applies to transactions an analyst takes on behalf of:
questions.explanation: Standard VI(B) addresses the treatment of both these accounts. The accounts of clients and employers have priority over personal accounts.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察对CFA职业行为准则VI(B)条款（交易优先权）适用对象的理解。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 明确准则VI(B)的核心内容：它规定了个人账户与客户账户、雇主账户之间的交易优先顺序。  
2. 判断适用对象：准则明确要求，客户和雇主的交易应优先于分析师个人的交易。  
3. 得出结论：因此，该条款同时适用于客户和雇主的交易。  
**易错提示**：不要误以为该条款只适用于客户交易，而忽略了雇主账户同样受此约束。

questions.question: Ryan Brown, CFA, is an analyst with a large insurance company. His personal portfolio includes a significant investment in QRS common stock. The director of the research department asked Brown to analyze QRS and write a report about its investment potential. Based on the Standards of Professional Conduct, Brown is required to:

options.A: disclose the ownership of the stock in the report.
options.C: sell his shares of QRS before issuing the report.

questions.explanation: Standard VI(A) Disclosure of Conflicts requires that Brown make full disclosure of all matters that could impair his objectivity. Brown needs to disclose his personal holding in QRS stock. Neither of the other choices describes an action that the Standard requires. (Module 71.8, LOS 71: VI(A))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中的利益冲突披露要求（Standard VI(A) Disclosure of Conflicts）。

**解题步骤**：
1. 识别情境：分析师个人持有其被要求撰写研究报告的公司的股票，这构成了潜在的利益冲突。
2. 依据准则：根据准则VI(A)，当个人利益可能影响其独立性与客观性时，必须进行充分披露。
3. 选择行动：准则要求的是披露该持股情况，而非直接拒绝撰写报告或强制卖出股票。

**易错提示**：易误选“拒绝撰写报告”，但准则通常不强制要求回避，而是首先要求充分披露。

questions.question: Recommended procedures to comply with the Standard concerning priority of transactions are least likelyto include:

options.B: disclosure to clients of the firm's policies in regard to personal investing.

questions.explanation: Standard VI(B) Priority of Transactions. Front-running is the purchase or sale of securities in advance of client trades to take advantage of knowledge of client activity and should be completely prohibited, not simply limited. Blackout periods and pre-clearance of employee trades are ways of accomplishing this. (Module 71.8, LOS 71: VI(B))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中的VI(B)交易优先权准则，重点理解合规措施与禁止行为。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 明确题目要求找出“最不可能包含”的推荐程序。  
2. 分析各选项：A) 静默期是常见合规手段；B) 向客户披露公司个人投资政策符合透明度要求；C) 限制抢先交易违反准则，因抢先交易应完全禁止而非限制。  
3. 对比准则核心：抢先交易必须彻底禁止，故“限制”该行为不符合推荐程序。  
**易错提示**：注意“限制”与“完全禁止”的区别，抢先交易在任何情况下都不被允许。

questions.question: When an analyst makes an investment recommendation, which of the following statements must be disclosed to clients?

options.A: Both of these statements must be disclosed to clients.
options.B: The firm is a market maker in the stock of the recommended company.
options.C: An employee of the firm holds a directorship with the recommended company x

questions.explanation: Both of these items are explicitly listed in the discussion of Standard VI(A), Disclosure of Conflicts.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业伦理准则中关于利益冲突披露的要求，特别是准则VI(A)中必须向客户披露的具体情况。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 根据CFA准则VI(A)，分析师在做出投资建议时，必须向客户披露可能影响其独立性与客观性的重大利益冲突。  
2. 选项B（公司是推荐股票的交易商）和选项C（公司员工在推荐公司担任董事）都属于典型的利益冲突情形，必须披露。  
3. 由于两项均需披露，因此正确答案为A（两者都必须披露）。  
**易错提示**：注意不要忽略任何一项必须披露的冲突情形，两者均属于准则明确要求披露的范围。

questions.question: Bill Valley has been working for Advisors, Inc., for several years, and he just joined CFA Institute. Valley routinely writes research reports on Pharmaceutical firms. Valley has recently been asked to serve on the board of directors of an organization that promotes the search for a cure of a certain cancer. Serving on the board is an unpaid position without any direct benefits other than meeting new people and potential clients. To comply with Standard VI, Disclosure of Conflicts, Valley needs to:

options.A: only disclose the position on the board to his supervisor.
options.B: do nothing. both disclose the position on the board to his supervisor and describe his responsibilities on the board.

questions.explanation: Valley could be affected by his position on the board because he may tend to favor investments in firms that do cancer research. To comply with Standard VI(A), Disclosure of Conflicts, Valley must inform his supervisor of this relationship and describe his responsibilities on the board. Even if his supervisor does not find the relationship troublesome, any subsequent action that could lead to a conflict of interest should be discussed with the firm's compliance officer.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中VI(A)利益冲突披露条款的应用，重点在于判断何种情况下需要披露以及向谁披露。

**解题步骤**：
1.  识别潜在利益冲突：Valley在制药公司研究部门工作，同时无偿加入了一个致力于癌症治疗的机构董事会。这可能导致他在研究报告中偏向于投资癌症研究公司。
2.  根据准则VI(A)判断行动要求：准则要求会员必须向其雇主披露可能损害其独立性与客观性的所有事项。因此，他需要向主管披露这一董事职务。
3.  明确披露内容：披露不仅包括担任董事这一事实，还应包括其在董事会中的职责描述，以便雇主全面评估潜在影响。

**易错提示**：易错选A，仅向主管披露职务但未描述职责，这不符合准则关于充分披露的要求。

questions.question: An analyst is serving on the Board of Directors of a local publicly traded company. To avoid violating the CFA Institute Code and Standards, the analyst must disclose this to:

options.A: both his employer and his clients and prospective clients.
options.B: no one since it should not cause a conflict of interest for the analyst.

questions.explanation: Serving on a Board of Directors should be disclosed to both the employer and clients and prospective clients. (Module 71.8, LOS 71: VI(A))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中关于利益冲突披露的要求，特别是涉及担任外部董事时的披露对象。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 识别情境：分析师担任本地上市公司董事会成员，这属于可能产生利益冲突的外部职务。  
2. 依据准则：根据CFA准则VI(A)利益冲突披露条款，此类潜在利益冲突需同时向雇主、客户和潜在客户披露。  
3. 匹配选项：选项A要求向双方披露，符合准则规定。  
**易错提示**：注意不能仅向雇主单方面披露，必须同时涵盖客户方。

questions.question: Ray Stone, CFA, follows the Amity Paving Company for his employer, Rubbell Securities. Which of the following scenarios is Stone/east likelyto have to disclose?

options.B: Stone's ownership of Amity securities. The fact that Stone's son worked at Amity as a laborer during the summer whil

questions.explanation: Members are required to disclose all matters that reasonably could interfere with their objectivity. Personal ownership of securities or a broker-dealer relationship with a covered firm could reasonably interfere with objectivity, but it is unlikely that a child's past employment would reasonably interfere with Stone's objectivity. (Module 71.8, LOS 71: VI(A))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业准则中关于利益冲突披露的要求，特别是何种情况可能影响客观性并需要披露。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 根据准则，会员必须披露任何可能合理影响其客观性的利益冲突。  
2. 分析各选项：A（经纪商关系）和B（个人持股）均属于典型利益冲突，通常需要披露；C（子女过往短期兼职）则不太可能合理影响客观性。  
3. 题目要求选出“最不需要披露”的情形，因此C为正确答案。  
**易错提示**：注意题目问的是“least likely to disclose”，需反向选择最不需要披露的选项，而非直接识别需要披露的情形。

questions.question: Connie Baker, CFA, is an analyst with the brokerage and investment banking firm Hill and Stevens (H&S). Baker's supervisor, John Lewis, has asked her to write a research report on Jagged Rock Brewing. The H&S mergers and acquisitions department has represented Jagged Rock in all of its acquisitions for the past 12 years. Both Hill and Stevens sit on Jagged Rock's board. According to the Standards of Professional Conduct, can Baker write the report?

options.A: No. Yes, if she discloses the directorships and the mergers-and-acquisitions
options.C: Yes, if she maintains her independence and objectivity in its preparation.

questions.explanation: Standard VI(A) Disclosure of Conflicts requires that members disclose to clients and prospects any potential conflicts of interest that could reasonably expect to impair their objectivity. It does not prohibit analysts with potential conflicts from writing the reports. (Module 71.8, LOS 71: VI(A))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中关于利益冲突披露的要求，特别是当存在可能影响客观性的关系时，分析师应如何处理。

**解题步骤**：
1. 识别题干中的关键利益冲突：H&S公司既是Jagged Rock的投行服务商（并购顾问），又在其董事会拥有席位。
2. 根据准则VI(A)-利益冲突披露，成员必须向客户和潜在客户披露任何可能合理预期会损害其独立性和客观性的利益冲突。
3. 分析选项：选项A正确，因为Baker必须披露这些关系；仅保持独立性和客观性（选项C）是不够的，披露是强制要求。

**易错提示**：易误选C，认为只要主观上保持独立客观即可，但准则明确要求必须进行披露。

questions.question: Patricia Spraetz is the chief financial officer and compliance officer at Super Selection Investment Advisors. Super Selection is a medium-sized money management firm which has incorporated the CFA Institute Code of Ethics and Standards of Practice into the firm's compliance manual. Karen Jackson is a portfolio manager for Super Selection. She is not a CFA charterholder. Jackson is friendly with David James, president of AMD, a rapidly growing biotech company. James has provided Jackson with recommendations in the biotech industry, which she buys for her own portfolio before buying them for her clients. For three years, Jackson has also served on AMD's board of directors but has never notified Super Selection of this fact. She has received options and fees as compensation. Recently, the board of AMD decided to raise capital by voting to issue shares to the public. This was attractive to board members (including Jackson) who wanted to exercise their stock options and sell their shares to get cash. When the demand for initial public offerings (IPO) diminished, just before AMD's public offering, James asked Jackson to commit to a large purchase of the offering for her portfolios. Jackson had previously determined that AMD was a questionable investment but agreed to reconsider at James' request. Her reevaluation confirmed the stock to be overpriced, but she nevertheless decided to purchase AMD for her clients' portfolios. Which of the following statements is NOT correct? Jackson did not violate Standard I||(A) on Fiduciary Duty to clients because she was bound by her fiduciary duty to AMD and its stockholders as a board

options.A: member. Therefore, when she reversed her decision to buy AMD shares for Super Selection's clients, portfolios on James' request, her obligation to AMD took precedence. Jackson violated Standard IV(B) regarding Disclosure of Additional
options.B: Compensation by not disclosing additional compensation in the form of cash and stock options received from AMD, as its board member to her employer. C, Jackson violated Standard VIA) regarding Conflicts of interest by not disclosing her board membership and ownership of stock options to her employer.

questions.explanation: Jackson has violated Standard II|(A) because her first obligation is to her firm's clients. Standard VI(A) addresses precisely these kinds of situations regarding potential conflict of interest. Given this conflict of interest, Jackson also compromised her objectivity in violation of Standard |(B). Her fiduciary duty to her clients takes precedence over her fiduciary duty to AMD's stockholders under the CFA Institute Code and Standards. By not disclosing her relationship with AMD, she also violated Standard IV(B). Making past personal security transactions ahead of purchase of the same securities for her clients has put Jackson in violation of Standard VI(B). This standard clearly prohibits such actions. (Module 71.8, LOS 71.a, 71.c, 71.b)
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题主要考查CFA职业伦理准则中关于客户利益优先（Standard III(A)）、额外报酬披露（Standard IV(B)）和利益冲突披露（Standard VI(A)）的理解。

**解题步骤**：
1. 分析选项A：根据CFA准则，投资专业人士对客户的受托责任是首要的，优先于对其他实体（如担任董事的公司）的责任。Jackson为满足AMD总裁要求而购买客户账户本已判定为定价过高的股票，明显将自身利益置于客户利益之上，违反了Standard III(A)。因此A项陈述错误。
2. 分析选项B：Jackson从AMD获得董事报酬（现金与期权）但未向雇主披露，这违反了Standard IV(B)关于额外报酬必须披露的规定。该项陈述正确。
3. 分析选项C：Jackson担任AMD董事并持有期权，这构成重大利益冲突，但未向雇主披露，违反了Standard VI(A)关于利益冲突披露的规定。该项陈述正确。

**易错提示**：易误认为对多个实体存在受托责任时可自行决定优先顺序，但准则明确规定客户利益永远至上。

questions.question: Dwight Dawson, a CFA charterholder and portfolio manager at Ascott Investments, was recently appointed to the investments committee at Brightwood College. He will receive no compensation from Brightwood for serving on this committee. Another person at Ascott manages part of Brightwood's endowment. Dawson does not inform Ascott's compliance office of his involvement with Brightwood, because he does not believe doing so is necessary. Brenda Hamilton, a CFA candidate, also works for Ascott as an investment analyst. Procedures established at Ascott prohibit personal trading in securities analyzed or recommended by Ascott. One of these securities is Horizon, a telecommunications firm. Hamilton buys 10 shares of Horizon for her infant son's trust account. She believes that reporting this purchase to Ascott's compliance officer is unnecessary because the amount of the transaction is small and is not for her own personal account. Did Dawson or Hamilton's actions violate CFA Institute Standards of Professional Conduct?
questions.explanation: Dawson violated Standard VI(A), Disclosure of Conflicts, by failing to inform Ascott of her involvement with Brightwood College. Dawson could reasonably be expected to be involved with investment policy decisions at Brightwood that could affect Ascott because Ascott manages a portion of Brightwood's endowment. Hamilton also violated Standard VI(A), because she ignored a directive of her employer. Her purchase of Horizon stock has an appearance of impropriety. Hamilton could discuss the purchase of Horizon stock with her firm's compliance officer and request an exception to the prohibition against personal trading in securities analyzed or recommended by Ascott.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题主要考查CFA职业行为准则中关于利益冲突披露（Standard VI(A)）的适用情况，特别是涉及雇主政策与个人交易的情形。

**解题步骤**：
1. 分析Dawson的行为：他无偿服务于Brightwood学院的投资委员会，而其雇主Ascott管理着该学院的部分捐赠基金。这构成了潜在的利益冲突，他必须向雇主披露。他未披露，违反了Standard VI(A)。
2. 分析Hamilton的行为：她违反了雇主Ascott明确禁止交易所分析或推荐证券的规定。尽管交易金额小且是为儿子信托账户购买，但这仍属于个人交易范畴，且未向合规部门报告或申请例外，违反了Standard VI(A)。
3. 综合判断：两人均违反了准则。

**易错提示**：易忽略Hamilton的行为，误以为交易金额小或账户非本人直接持有就不构成违规，但关键在于她违反了明确的雇主规定且未进行披露或沟通。

questions.question: Andy Rock, CFA, is an analyst at Best Trade Co. The company is going to announce a sell recommendation on Biomed stock in one hour. Rock was a member of the team who reached the decision on Biomed. Rock's wife has an account at Best Trade Co. that contains Biomed stock. According to the Code and Standards, trading on Rock's wife's account can begin:

options.A: only after the recommendation is announced to the general public. only after Rock, as a beneficial owner, has given an appropriate amount of time
options.B: for clients and his employer to act.
options.C: as soon as the information is disseminated to all clients.

questions.explanation: Family accounts that are client accounts should be treated like any other firm account and should neither be given special treatment nor be disadvantaged because of an existing family relationship with the member or candidate. Members or candidates may undertake transactions in accounts for which they are a beneficial owner only after their clients and employers have had adequate opportunity to act on the recommendation. Personal transactions include those made for the member or candidate's own account, for family (including spouse, children, and other immediate family members) accounts, and for accounts in which the member or candidate has a direct or indirect pecuniary interest, such as a trust or retirement account. It could be argued that Rock is a beneficial owner of his wife's account and the reason why his wife's account should be treated like any other client account is because it does not state that Rock makes the trades in his wife's account. From that we are to infer that another person other than Rock is managing his wife's account thus she should be treated like any other client. (Module 71.8, LOS 71: VI(B))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中关于“利益冲突-个人交易”的规定，特别是涉及家庭成员账户的交易时机。

**解题步骤**：
1. 首先，识别题目核心：Rock的妻子在Rock所在公司有账户并持有相关股票，而Rock参与了卖出建议的决策。
2. 其次，应用准则关键原则：对于家庭成员（如配偶）的账户，若该账户是公司的客户账户，则应被视为与其他任何客户账户同等对待，既不应获得优待也不应处于劣势。
3. 最后，得出结论：由于该账户是公司客户账户，因此交易可以在信息（卖出建议）被传达给所有客户后开始。

**易错提示**：易与“受益人（Beneficial Owner）”账户的交易规定混淆，若Rock本人是账户的受益人，则需等待客户和雇主先行交易，但本题情境强调其妻子的账户是公司客户账户，应同等对待。

questions.question: Judy Gonzales is a portfolio manager with Brenly Capital and works on Johnson Company's account. Brenly has a policy against accepting gifts over $25 from clients. The Johnson portfolio has a fantastic year, and in appreciation, the pension fund manager sent Gonzales a rare bottle of wine. Gonzales should: inform her supervisor in writing that she received additional compensation in the form of the wine.

options.B: present the bottle of wine to her supervisor.
options.C: return the bottle to the client explaining Brenly's policy.

questions.explanation: By not returning the bottle she would be violating the Standard on disclosure of conflicts to the employer, which states that employees must comply with prohibitions imposed by their employer.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中“对雇主的义务”准则，特别是关于雇主政策（如礼物限制）的遵守要求。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确认题干关键信息：公司政策禁止接受客户超过$25的礼物，而客户赠送的稀有葡萄酒显然属于此范畴。  
2. 根据准则要求，员工必须遵守雇主的限制性政策，因此直接退回礼物并说明公司政策是合规做法。  
3. 仅书面报告或转交上级不符合政策禁止性规定，无法解决违规问题。  
**易错提示**：注意“书面报告上级”看似谨慎，但未实际遵守政策禁止接受礼物的核心要求，仍属违规。

questions.question: Williams and Fudd is a major London-based brokerage and investment banking firm. Heritage Group, a money management firm, is the first, second, or third largest holder of each of the securities listed on Williams & Fudd's "PrimeShare #10" equity security list. On Tuesday morning, August 22, Williams & Fudd released a research report recommending the purchase of Skelmerdale Industries to the public and to its clients. On Wednesday afternoon, August 23, Heritage Group bought 1.5 million shares of Skelmerdale. This action is:

options.A: a violation of the Standard concerning fair dealing.
options.B: a violation of the Standard concerning disclosure of conflicts.
options.C: in accordance with the CFA Institute Code and Standards.

questions.explanation: These actions are in accordance with both Standards III(B), Fair Dealing, and VI(B), Priority of Transactions. There is no violation. (Module 71.8, LOS 71.a, 71.c, 71.b)
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题主要考查对CFA职业行为准则中“公平交易”和“交易优先权”两项准则的理解，特别是关于研究报告发布与客户交易顺序的合规性。

**解题步骤**：
1.  首先，判断Heritage Group（资产管理公司）与Williams & Fudd（发布研究报告的投行）的关系。题目指出Heritage是Williams & Fudd推荐股票列表上证券的主要持有者，但并未说明两者存在可能影响研究报告客观性的重大利益冲突（如隶属同一集团）。
2.  其次，分析关键时间顺序：投行在8月22日（周二）上午向**公众和其客户**同时发布研究报告；Heritage在8月23日（周三）下午才进行交易。
3.  最后，根据准则进行判断：由于研究报告已同时向所有客户和公众披露，Heritage作为客户在报告发布**之后**进行交易，并未利用未公开的信息或获得优先于其他客户的交易机会，因此不违反公平交易（III(B)）或交易优先权（VI(B)）准则。

**易错提示**：易错误认为大客户在报告发布后立即交易属于违规，但关键在于研究报告是否已公平地发布给所有客户，而非交易时间的绝对早晚。

questions.question: An analyst has a large personal holding of a security, and he has just determined that market conditions warrant selling this security. The analyst contacts clients who have a position in the security and advises them to sell some or all of the security. After waiting 24 hours, he sells the security from his personal accounts. This is:

options.A: a violation of Standard I||(B), Fair Dealing.
options.B: a violation of Standard VI(B), Priority of Transactions.
options.C: congruent with Standard VI(B), Priority of Transactions.

questions.explanation: According to Standard VI(B), an analyst must give clients the first opportunity to buy or sell a security before the analyst acts on his own behalf. A 24-hour waiting period seems reasonable under the circumstances presented. The analyst seems to have a reasonable basis, and there is no reason to believe that he is violating Standard I||(B) since he contacted all of the clients who have a position in the security. (Module 71.8, LOS 71: VI(B))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业准则中的Standard VI(B) Priority of Transactions（交易优先权），核心是分析师在个人交易前是否给予了客户充分和优先的交易机会。

**解题步骤**：
1.  根据准则VI(B)，分析师在为自己的账户进行交易前，必须给予客户充分的机会，使其能基于分析师的研究或建议优先行动。
2.  题目中，分析师在决定卖出后，首先联系了所有持有该证券的客户并建议他们卖出，这给予了客户优先行动的机会。
3.  随后，他等待了24小时才进行个人交易，这个等待期为客户执行交易提供了合理的时间，因此其行为符合准则VI(B)的要求。

**易错提示**：不要误以为分析师在任何情况下都必须等待客户全部交易完成后才能进行个人交易，准则要求的是给予客户“充分和优先的机会”，合理的等待期是满足此要求的关键。

questions.question: According to Standard VI(A), Disclosures of Conflicts, members must disclose to their clients the member's (or their firm's) material ownership of all of the following EXCEPT:
questions.explanation: Unless the firm's real estate holdings would impair their independence and objectivity, they need not be disclosed. (Module 71.8, LOS 71: VI(A))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业准则中Standard VI(A)关于利益冲突披露的具体要求，特别是哪些事项必须披露。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 回忆Standard VI(A)的核心规定：会员必须向客户披露可能影响其独立性与客观性的任何重大利益冲突。  
2. 分析各选项：A（公司融资关系）和C（证券的实际所有权）通常属于必须披露的重大利益冲突范畴。  
3. 判断例外情况：房地产持有（B）除非影响到独立性与客观性，否则不属于强制披露范围，因此是本题的例外项。  
**易错提示**：注意区分“所有利益冲突”与“必须披露的利益冲突”，并非所有资产持有都需要披露，关键看是否影响专业判断。

questions.question: Phil Trobb, CFA, is preparing a purchase recommendation on Aneas Lumber for his research firm. Which of the following/east likelyrepresents a conflict of interest that Trobb should disclose in his report?

options.A: Trobb's research firm has a large stake of ownership in Aneas.
options.B: Aneas hires Trobb as a consultant to analyze Aneas' financial statements.
options.C: Trobb's cousin repairs machines for Aneas.

questions.explanation: Standard VI(A) Disclosure of Conflicts defines what constitutes a conflict of interest with regard to clients, prospective clients, and employers. All of these represent potential conflicts of interest with the exception of the cousin working for Aneas Lumber in a job that is unrelated to the Aneas' financing.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA道德准则VI(A)利益冲突披露，重点在于判断何种关系构成必须披露的利益冲突。

**解题步骤**：
1.  分析选项A：研究公司持有被研究公司大量股份，这构成了重大的财务利益冲突，必须披露。
2.  分析选项B：分析师本人受雇于被研究公司担任顾问，这构成了直接的个人利益冲突，必须披露。
3.  分析选项C：分析师的亲属在被研究公司担任与公司融资无关的基层技术工作，这种关系通常不构成重大的、需要披露的利益冲突。

**易错提示**：需区分“潜在利益冲突”与“必须披露的重大利益冲突”，并非所有关联关系都需要披露。

questions.question: Jan Hirsh, CFA, is employed as manager of a college endowment fund. The college's board of directors has recently voted to consider divesting from companies located in a country that has a poor civil rights record. Hirsh has personal investments in several firms in the country. Hirsh needs to:

options.A: do nothing since the board has not made a decision yet.
options.B: disclose her ownership in the stocks to her supervisor only.
options.C: disclose her ownership in the stocks to both her supervisor and the board.

questions.explanation: From the given information, there is no conflict of interest and no violation of Standard VI(A), Disclosure of Conflicts. A conflict could arise if the board were to ask Hirsh what the effect on the college's endowment would be if they were to divest. At that time she would have to reveal her ownership in the stocks to make known the possible conflict of interest. (Module 71.8, LOS 71: VI(A))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中关于利益冲突披露的时机判断，具体涉及Standard VI(A) Disclosure of Conflicts的应用。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 判断当前是否存在实际利益冲突：董事会仅投票考虑撤资，尚未做出最终决定，也未要求Hirsh提供相关分析或建议。  
2. 根据准则要求，利益冲突披露应在可能影响客观性前进行，但当前无具体职责冲突。  
3. 因此，在董事会未做出决定且未指派相关任务时，无需立即披露个人持股。  
**易错提示**：注意区分“考虑阶段”与“决策执行阶段”，避免过早或过度披露未实际发生的冲突。

questions.question: When Wes Smith first joined Advisors, Inc., he was excited that all the analysts at the firm had the CFA designation. In letters to prospective clients, he states that this ensures that Advisors can provide better service than their competitors. With respect to Standard VII(B), Reference to CFA Institute, the CFA Designation, and the CFA Program, this is: a violation for both mentioning the CFA designation and saying the firm can guarantee better service.

options.B: a violation because he mentions the CFA designation in the letter.
options.C: a violation because he cannot guarantee better service.

questions.explanation: According to Standard VII(B), the analyst cannot guarantee better service. Smith can mention the fact that all analysts have the designation, but he is limited in what he can say with respect to this fact. He could say, for example, that this means the analysts all had to take and pass three rigorous exams.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则VII(B)条款，关于提及CFA称号、CFA协会和CFA项目的合规要求，特别是不得暗示或保证更好的投资表现或服务。

**解题步骤**：
1. 根据准则VII(B)，提及CFA称号本身并不违规，例如说明公司分析师均持有CFA称号是允许的。
2. 但准则禁止暗示或保证持有CFA称号能带来更好的投资结果或服务，因为这可能构成不当陈述。
3. 题目中Smith声称CFA称号“确保能提供比竞争对手更好的服务”，这构成了对服务质量的保证，因此违规。

**易错提示**：容易误认为提及CFA称号本身即违规，但准则允许在符合规定的前提下客观陈述事实。

questions.question: Judy Albert and Bob Tye, who recently started their own investment advisory business, plan to take the Level ||I CFA examination next year. Albert's business card reads, "Judy Albert, CFA Candidate." Tye has not put anything about the CFA on his business card. However, the firm's promotional materials describe the CFA requirements and indicate that Tye participates in the CFA program and has completed Levels I and II. According to CFA Institute Standards of Professional Conduct:

options.A: Albert has violated the Standards but Tye has not.
options.B: Both Albert and Tye have violated the Standards.
options.C: Neither Albert nor Tye has violated the Standards.

questions.explanation: On letterheads and business cards and in directory listings, only the mark CFA or the words Chartered Financial Analyst should appear after the charterholder's name.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA考生在名片、信头等材料中提及CFA项目时的合规要求，涉及职业行为准则中对“CFA考生”身份披露的规定。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 根据准则，在名片、信头等正式材料中，仅允许已持证人使用“CFA”或“Chartered Financial Analyst”称谓。  
2. Albert在名片上使用“CFA Candidate”违反准则，因为考生不得在名片上标注与CFA相关的身份。  
3. Tye虽未在名片上标注，但公司宣传材料中说明其参与CFA项目并完成两级考试，这属于对CFA项目的客观描述，不违反准则。  
**易错提示**：注意区分“在名片上标注考生身份”与“在宣传材料中描述CFA项目进度”的不同合规要求。

questions.question: A CFA Institute member puts the following statement on her resume: "I passed each level of the CFA exam on the first try." Is this a violation of Standard VII(B)?

options.A: No, because it is a statement of fact.
options.B: Yes, because she incorrectly refers to the CFA exam.
options.C: Yes, because saying she passed exams on the first try is not appropriate.

questions.explanation: The statement is not a violation because it is a fact. However, the member must not go on to claim superior performance.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中的Standard VII(B) - Reference to CFA Institute, the CFA Designation, and the CFA Program，重点在于判断对CFA考试经历的陈述是否构成违规。

**解题步骤**：
1.  判断陈述内容是否为客观事实。题目中的陈述“我每次都是一次性通过CFA考试”是个人考试经历的真实描述。
2.  根据准则，陈述客观事实本身并不违反规定。
3.  关键区别在于该陈述没有暗示或声称自己因一次性通过而具备更优越的能力或表现。

**易错提示**：容易误认为提及“一次性通过”属于不当陈述，但准则禁止的是基于此事实进行“能力更优”的引申或暗示，而非陈述事实本身。

questions.question: Jean Davis and Brian Taylor were recently hired by a local brokerage. Davis is registered for the Level |I CFA exam and does not reference the CFA designation on her business card. In her marketing materials, Davis factually describes CFA requirements and notes that she expects to pass in June. Taylor passed the Level II exam and has not yet registered for the Level |II CFA exam. Taylor also does not reference the CFA designation on his card and writes in his marketing materials that he passed both Levels I and Il of the CFA exam on his first try, which is true. Have Davis or Taylor violated any CFA Institute Standards of Professional Conduct?
questions.explanation: Davis violated Standard VII(B) Reference to the CFA Institute, the CFA Designation, and the CFA Program because she stated a future date in which she expected to pass. Candidates who imply partial designations or expected completion dates violate this Standard. Stating a fact about having passed each of the first two levels on the first try does not violate the Standard. (Module 71.9, LOS 71: VII(B))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA协会职业行为准则中关于CFA称号、协会及项目引用的规定（Standard VII(B)），特别是对考生在宣传材料中如何描述自身考试状态的要求。

**解题步骤**：
1.  分析Davis的行为：她虽未在名片上使用CFA称号，但在营销材料中陈述了预计通过考试的具体日期（“expects to pass in June”）。这违反了Standard VII(B)，因为候选人不得暗示部分资格或预期完成日期。
2.  分析Taylor的行为：他未在名片上使用CFA称号，且在营销材料中真实陈述了已通过一级和二级考试（且均为首次通过）的事实。这属于对事实的客观描述，没有违规。
3.  综合判断：只有Davis违反了准则。

**易错提示**：容易误认为Taylor陈述“首次通过”属于不当宣传，但准则仅禁止虚假陈述，真实、客观的事实描述本身并不违规。

questions.question: Lucy Ackert and Chris Brown prepared the following information to be included in the promotional materials of their employer, Lofton Securities. • Lucy Ackert is one of five CFAs at Lofton Securities. She satisfied all requirements for the CFA designation in 1998. • Chris Brown holds a CFA Level I designation, which he passed in 2001. He is registered to take the next scheduled Level II examination. Are the promotional materials prepared by Ackert and Brown fully consistent with the Standards of Professional Conduct?
questions.explanation: The second statement is not consistent with Standard VII(B), Reference to CFA Institute, the CFA Designation, and the CFA Program. Regarding the first statement, using "CFA" as a noun is no longer a violation of the Code of Standards. No designation exists for someone who has passed Level I of the CFA examination. Thus, Brown's statement saying that he "holds a CFA Level I designation" represents incorrect use. A correct statement would be: "Chris Brown passed Level I of the CFA examination in 2001."
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA持证人及考生在宣传材料中提及CFA称号、资格和项目的合规性（Standard VII(B)）。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 分析Ackert的陈述：她已满足所有要求并在1998年成为CFA持证人，使用“CFA”作为名词描述身份符合现行准则。  
2. 分析Brown的陈述：他仅通过CFA一级考试，但声称“持有CFA一级称号”，这违反了CFA项目的规定（通过单级考试不能使用“CFA”或“CFA Level I”等称号）。  
3. 根据准则判断：Ackert的陈述合规，Brown的陈述不合规。  
**易错提示**：注意通过单级考试的考生不能使用“CFA”或任何类似称号，只能如实说明通过哪一级考试。

questions.question: All of the following are required for a CFA Institute member to maintain his or her active status EXCEPT:

options.A: Passing each exam in no more than two tries.
options.B: paying membership dues to CFA Institute on an annual basis.
options.C: remit a completed Professional Conduct Statement on an annual basis.

questions.explanation: Passing each exam in two or fewer tries is not required to maintain active status as a member of the CFA Institute. CFA Institute imposes both of the other choices. (Module 71.9, LOS 71: VI|(B))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA协会会员维持活跃状态（active status）的必备条件。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 明确题干要求：找出“不需要”满足的条件（EXCEPT）。  
2. 回顾CFA协会会员义务：每年缴纳会费（B选项）、每年提交职业行为声明（C选项）是强制要求。  
3. 确认例外项：协会并未规定考生必须在两次内通过各级考试（A选项），因此A是正确答案。  
**易错提示**：注意题干中的“EXCEPT”，避免误选描述正确义务的选项。

questions.question: Which of the following actions would be a violation of the Standard VII(A) Conduct as Participants in CFA Institute Programs?

options.A: Misrepresenting information on the Professional Conduct Statement. Using the CFA designation without submitting a Professional Conduct Statemel
options.C: Exaggerating the implications of holding the CFA designation.

questions.explanation: Misrepresenting information on the Professional Conduct Statement is a direct violation of Standard VI|(A) Conduct as Participants in CFA Institute Programs. The other choices are violations of Standard VII(B) Reference to CFA Institute, the CFA Designation, and the CFA Program.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA道德准则中Standard VII(A)（作为CFA项目参与者的行为）与Standard VII(B)（提及CFA协会、CFA称号与CFA项目）的违规行为区分。

**解题步骤**：
1. 明确Standard VII(A)的核心要求：作为CFA项目参与者（如考生、持证人），在参与CFA项目相关活动（如考试、填写职业行为陈述等）时不得有不诚实行为。
2. 分析各选项：A选项涉及在职业行为陈述中虚报信息，这直接违反了参与CFA项目时的诚信要求，属于VII(A)范畴。B和C选项均涉及不当使用CFA称号或夸大其含义，这属于对CFA称号本身的不当引用，应归为VII(B)的违规。
3. 根据以上区分，选出直接违反VII(A)的选项。

**易错提示**：容易将涉及CFA称号使用不当的所有行为都归为VII(A)，但需注意VII(A)主要规范参与CFA项目过程中的行为，而称号使用规范主要由VII(B)管辖。

questions.question: Anderson, Baker and Chang all received their CFA charters and ordered new business cards. Their business cards are as follows: G. J. Anderson, CFA B. K. Baker, Chartered Financial Analyst M. S. Chang, C.F.A Which of the business cards use the CFA marks improperly?
questions.explanation: Consistent with Standard VII(B), members must use the CFA marks in a proper manner. Members may indicate "CFA" or "Chartered Financial Analyst" after their names, but the designation should not be given more prominence than that used in printing the name itself. Also, periods should not be used to separate the letters.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA持证人使用CFA标识的规范，重点在于标识的格式和突出程度。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 根据CFA协会准则VII(B)，持证人可在姓名后使用“CFA”或“Chartered Financial Analyst”标识。  
2. 检查三张名片：Anderson使用“CFA”正确；Baker使用全称“Chartered Financial Analyst”正确；Chang使用带句点的“C.F.A.”不符合规定（字母间不应加句点）。  
3. 因此，只有Chang的名片使用不当。  
**易错提示**：注意“CFA”字母间加句点（如C.F.A.）是常见错误，不符合标识格式要求。

questions.question: While on a business trip, John Hayes, CFA, found a notebook that had apparently been left in the waiting area of an airport. Hayes opened the notebook and read the title: Confidential: Level || CFA Examination. Before returning the notebook to CFA Institute, he made a copy and gave it to Linda Sacket, one of his firm's analysts, who was a candidate for Level Il of the CFA examination. Sacket read the questions and guideline answers before taking the Level I| examination. According to the CFA Institute Standards of Professional Conduct:

options.A: Hayes violated the Standards, but Sacket did not.
options.B: both Hayes and Sacket violated the Standards.
options.C: Sacket violated the Standards, but Hayes did not.

questions.explanation: Both violated Standard VII(A) Conduct as Participants in CFA Institute Programs because they compromised the validity of the examinations. (Module 71.9, LOS 71: VI|(A))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中的VII(A)条款，即作为CFA项目参与者的行为准则，特别是关于维护考试有效性的责任。

**解题步骤**：
1. 判断行为：Hayes发现并复制了机密考试资料，并将其交给了考生Sacket。
2. 应用准则：根据VII(A)条款，任何损害考试有效性的行为都违反了准则。
3. 得出结论：Hayes（传播资料）和Sacket（使用资料备考）的行为都损害了考试的公正性和有效性，因此两人均违反了准则。

**易错提示**：易误认为只有实际使用资料的考生违规，而传播资料者无责，但准则要求所有参与者共同维护考试诚信。

questions.question: Which of the following isleast likely a violation of Standard VII(A), Conduct as Participants in CFA Institute Programs?

options.A: Improperly using the CFA Designation to further professional goals. C
options.B: Expressing opinions in disagreement with CFA Institute advocacy positions.
options.C: Disregarding the rules related to the administration of the CFA examination.

questions.explanation: Members and Candidates are allowed to express their opinions about the CFA Institute and CFA Program. Both of the other choices violate Standard VII(A) Conduct as Participants in CFA Institute Programs.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA道德准则第七大条(A)款（作为CFA项目参与者的行为）的适用范围，重点区分何种行为构成违规。

**解题步骤**：
1.  回顾准则VII(A)的核心内容：该准则要求会员和考生不得损害CFA项目、考试或特许金融分析师称号的声誉、诚信或有效性。
2.  分析各选项：
    *   A选项（不当使用CFA称号以促进职业目标）：这直接损害了称号的诚信，属于违规。
    *   B选项（表达与CFA协会倡导立场不同的意见）：这属于个人观点表达，只要不诋毁项目声誉，并不违反该准则。
    *   C选项（无视CFA考试管理规则）：这直接破坏了考试的有效性和公平性，属于违规。
3.  题目要求选出“最不可能”违规的选项，因此B选项符合要求。

**易错提示**：需注意区分“表达不同意见”（通常允许）与“损害项目声誉或有效性”的行为（违规）。

questions.question: The CFA logo may be used as a certification mark:
questions.explanation: Individual charterholders may use the CFA logo on a business card or letterhead. The CFA logo may not be used by a company or firm. (Module 71.9, LOS 71: VII(B))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA徽标的使用规范，特别是个人持证人与公司在使用徽标时的区别。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 根据CFA协会规定，个人持证人可以在名片或信头上使用CFA徽标。  
2. 公司或企业不得使用CFA徽标，因此公司网站或公司标识旁不得使用。  
3. 对比选项，只有A项（个人名片）符合个人使用条件。  
**易错提示**：注意区分个人使用与公司使用的场景，避免误以为公司可展示徽标。

questions.question: Which of the following statements is a violation of Standard VII(B) if it is included on a CFA charterholder's resume?

options.A: My earning the CFA designation indicates my superior ability.
options.B: Both of these are violations of Standard VII(B).
options.C: My earning the CFA designation indicates my desire to maintain high standard:

questions.explanation: A CFA charterholder may not make claims about how earning the designation proves superior capabilities. Saying "my earning the CFA designation indicates my desire to maintain high standards" is allowed because it is a factual statement.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中的Standard VII(B) - Reference to CFA Institute, the CFA Designation, and the CFA Program，重点在于CFA持证人如何恰当地在简历中提及CFA资格。

**解题步骤**：
1. 识别Standard VII(B)的核心规定：持证人不得暗示或宣称获得CFA资格即代表其具备优于他人的专业能力。
2. 分析选项A：该表述声称获得CFA资格表明其“superior ability”（卓越能力），这直接违反了不得暗示能力优越性的规定。
3. 分析选项C：该表述声称获得CFA资格表明其“desire to maintain high standards”（维持高标准的意愿），这属于对个人动机或承诺的事实性陈述，是允许的。

**易错提示**：容易混淆“表明高标准的意愿”（允许）和“表明卓越的能力”（禁止）这两种表述。

questions.question: Jason Jones, a stock broker who has completed Level I of the CFA program and is registered for the next Level II CFA exam, may:

options.A: state that he is a Level II candidate in the CFA Program. not mention that he is involved in the CFA Program until he has passed all thre levels.
options.C: use the Level | CFA designation since he has passed the Level I exam.

questions.explanation: According to Standard VII(B) Reference to CFA Institute, the CFA Designation, and the CFA Program, Jason may refer to his participation in the program but must state that he is a candidate and specify the level of the exam for which he is registered. There is no partial designation. (Module 71.9, LOS 71: VII(B))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业道德准则中关于提及CFA项目参与情况的规定（Standard VII(B)）。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 根据准则VII(B)，已报名CFA考试但未持证者，可以提及自己参与CFA项目。  
2. 必须明确说明自己是考生（candidate），并注明已报名的考试级别。  
3. 选项A符合准则要求，选项B禁止提及过于严格，选项C使用“CFA designation”错误（通过单科考试不授予任何称号）。  
**易错提示**：注意通过某一级别考试不等于获得“CFA designation”，只有通过全部三级考试并满足其他要求才可使用CFA持证人称号。

questions.question: An analyst has not paid his CFA Institute dues for several years but has filed a professional conduct statement annually. Which of the following statements regarding his status with CFA Institute is most accurate? The analyst:

options.A: may not refer to having been a CFA charterholder.
options.B: may not use the CFA designation.
options.C: is still considered an active member of CFA Institute.

questions.explanation: Standard VII(B) Reference to CFA Institute, the CFA Designation, and the CFA Program, applies. To remain an active member and maintain the right use the CFA designation, the member must pay annual dues and submit a yearly Professional Conduct Statement. Nothing in the Standard prohibits factual references to one's past status as a CFA charterholder. (Module 71.9, LOS 71: VII(B))
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA协会会员资格及称号使用规范，重点在于未缴纳会费时CFA持证人称号的使用限制。

**解题步骤**：
1. 根据CFA职业行为准则VII(B)条款，保持活跃会员资格及使用CFA称号，必须满足两个条件：按时缴纳年费并提交年度职业行为声明。
2. 题目中分析师未缴纳年费但提交了声明，因此不满足保持活跃会员资格的全部条件。
3. 准则禁止未满足条件者使用CFA称号，但并未禁止其如实陈述自己过去曾是CFA持证人的事实。

**易错提示**：注意区分“使用CFA称号”和“提及自己曾是持证人”是两种不同的行为，受不同规则约束。

questions.question: Julie Stades retired several years ago and relinquished her membership in CFA Institute. She had the CFA designation up until then. She has decided to go back to work and puts the following statement on her resume: "I earned the CFA designation 10 years ago." Is this a violation of Standard VII(B)?

options.A: Yes, she must state that she no longer holds the CFA designation.
options.B: No, as long as she does not indicate she currently has the designation.
options.C: Yes, because she is no longer an active member.

questions.explanation: Stades is allowed to state that she earned the designation as long as she does not infer that she currently has the designation.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业道德准则VII(B)关于CFA持证人称号使用的规定，重点在于区分“曾经获得”与“当前持有”的表述差异。

**解题步骤**：
1. 确认关键事实：Julie已退休并放弃了CFA协会会员资格，但她确实曾通过考试并获得CFA称号。
2. 分析准则要求：根据准则VII(B)，若不再符合持证要求，则不得声称自己“是”CFA持证人，但可以陈述自己“曾获得”该称号的历史事实。
3. 判断陈述内容：她在简历中写的是“我于10年前获得了CFA称号”，这属于对过去事实的陈述，并未暗示当前仍持有该资格。

**易错提示**：易混淆“曾经获得”与“当前持有”的表述，错误认为一旦放弃会员资格就完全不能提及CFA称号。

questions.question: Nichole Zeller and Randy Toffler have both passed Level Il of the CFA Exam Program and have registered for Level III. Zeller circulates a resume stating that she is a candidate for the CFA designation and has passed Level Il of the CFA program. Toffler circulates a resume stating that he is a CFA II. Which of the following statements is CORRECT?

options.A: Only Zeller has violated the Code of Standards.
options.B: Both Zeller and Toffler have violated the Code of Standards.
options.C: Only Toffler has violated the Code of Standards.

questions.explanation: The Code and Standards permit an individual to state that he or she is a candidate for the CFA designation as long as the person is registered for the next CFA exam. The same individual may state the fact that he or she has passed Level I or II of the CFA program. There is no partial designation, such as CFA II.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA道德准则中关于候选人及通过级别表述的合规性。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 根据CFA准则，注册参加下一级别考试的人可声明自己是CFA候选人，并可说明已通过某一级别考试。  
2. Zeller声明自己是CFA候选人且已通过二级，符合规定；Toffler使用“CFA II”表述，暗示部分称号，违反准则。  
3. 因此仅Toffler违规。  
**易错提示**：注意“CFA II”这类部分称号表述是明确禁止的，而说明通过级别本身是允许的。

questions.question: June Carter passed Level III of the CFA examination in June but will not complete her work experience requirement until August of next year. Carter can state on her resume that she:

options.B: passed Levels I, II, and III of the CFA examination. will be a CFA charterholder in August of next year as long as she is on track to * complete her work experience.

questions.explanation: A candidate cannot use any form of the CFA designation until receiving her charter.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA持证人资格的正确表述方式，特别是通过三级考试但尚未满足工作经验要求时的合规声明。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 确认候选人已通过三级考试，但尚未满足工作经验要求，因此不能使用“CFA”或类似称谓。  
2. 检查各选项的合规性：A选项“CFA in waiting”暗示与CFA称号相关，违反规定；B选项仅陈述通过考试的事实，并说明未来满足条件后可成为持证人，符合要求。  
3. 根据CFA协会道德准则，选择完全合规的表述。  
**易错提示**：注意在未正式持证前，任何暗示已拥有CFA称号的表述（如“CFA in waiting”）都是违规的。

questions.question: Which of the following parties may adopt and claim compliance with Global Investment Performance Standards (GIPS)?

options.A: An investment management firm located in Indonesia.
options.B: The chief compliance officer for a regional money manager. A software firm that developed a software package that assists investment firm in achieving GIPS compliance.

questions.explanation: Only an investment firm that actually manages assets can claim compliance with GIPS.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：GIPS（全球投资业绩标准）的合规主体资格，即只有实际管理资产的机构才能声明遵循GIPS。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 明确GIPS合规声明的核心要求：声明主体必须是实际从事资产管理的投资公司。  
2. 分析各选项：A为印尼的投资管理公司，符合主体要求；B为个人职位，C为软件公司，均非资产管理实体。  
3. 根据GIPS规定，只有A选项中的投资管理公司可以采纳并声明遵循GIPS。  
**易错提示**：注意GIPS合规主体必须是资产管理公司，而非个人、服务商或软件开发商。

questions.question: Which of the following statementsmost accuratelydescribes verification under the Global Investment Performance Standards (GIPS)? GIPS verification:

options.A: is required for a firm to claim GIPS compliance.
options.B: requires a verification report to be issued for the entire firm.

questions.explanation: A single verification report is issued with respect to the entire firm; GIPS verification cannot be carried out for a single composite.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察GIPS（全球投资业绩标准）中关于“verification”（验证）的基本要求，特别是验证的范围和强制性。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 明确GIPS验证的性质：验证是对公司整体是否符合GIPS标准的独立核查，而非针对单个组合（composite）。  
2. 判断各选项：A错误，因为验证是自愿的，非强制要求；B正确，验证报告针对整个公司；C错误，验证不针对单个组合。  
**易错提示**：容易误以为验证是强制要求或针对特定组合，需区分“合规声明”与“验证”的自愿性。

questions.question: Which of the following statements about a GIPS-compliant firm's verification of GIPS compliance is most accurate? Verification is:

options.A: optional, but if chosen it must be performed by an independent third party.
options.B: required, and may be performed by the firm's internal auditors.
options.C: required, and must be performed by an independent third party.

questions.explanation: Verification of GIPS compliance is recommended but not required. If a firm chooses to obtain GIPS verification, it is required to be performed by an independent third party.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察GIPS（全球投资业绩标准）中关于验证（verification）的要求，重点是验证是否强制以及由谁执行。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 根据GIPS准则，验证（verification）本身不是强制要求，而是推荐性（optional/recommended）的。  
2. 如果公司选择进行验证，则必须由独立第三方（independent third party）执行。  
3. 对比选项：A符合上述两点；B和C错误，因为验证不是强制要求的。  
**易错提示**：注意区分“推荐但非强制”与“强制”，以及内部审计与独立第三方的区别。

questions.question: The section of the Global Investment Performance Standards (GIPS) that outlines defining the firm and documenting firm policies and procedures is:
questions.explanation: According to Section 1, Fundamentals of Compliance, the definition of the firm is the foundation for firm-wide compliance and creates boundaries in order to determine total firm assets.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察GIPS标准中关于公司定义及政策程序记录要求所属的具体章节。

**解题步骤**：
1. 识别题目核心：题目问的是“定义公司并记录公司政策和程序”属于GIPS的哪个部分。
2. 回顾GIPS标准结构：GIPS标准中，“Fundamentals of Compliance”（合规基本原则）部分是整个标准的基础，其中明确包含了公司的定义以及相关政策和程序的制定与记录要求。
3. 匹配选项：选项C“Fundamentals of Compliance”与上述内容直接对应。

**易错提示**：不要将公司定义与具体的组合构建或广告指南等后续操作章节混淆。

questions.question: When measuring and presenting their investment performance, GIPS compliant firms are required to:

options.A: disclose the performance of the best-performing accounts in each composite. exclude time periods that are unrepresentative of the firm's performance history.
options.C: include terminated accounts in their performance history.

questions.explanation: Because excluding terminated accounts introduces survivorship bias, GIPS requires firms to include these accounts in their performance history. The other two choices describe misleading performance presentation practices that GIPS are designed to avoid.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察GIPS（全球投资业绩标准）中关于业绩呈现的要求，特别是如何避免偏差。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 理解GIPS的核心目标：确保投资业绩的透明度和可比性，避免误导性做法。  
2. 分析各选项：A（披露最佳业绩账户）和B（排除不具代表性的时期）都可能扭曲业绩，违反GIPS原则；C（包含已终止账户）可防止生存偏差，是GIPS的要求。  
3. 根据GIPS规定，选择正确描述其要求的选项。  
**易错提示**：注意GIPS强调完整、公平的业绩记录，避免只展示有利数据。

questions.question: With regard to Global Investment Performance standards (GIPS), if the Chief Investment Officer of an investment advisory firm also is a CFA charterholder:

options.A: the firm is required to comply with GIPS. C
options.B: neither the firm nor the charterholder are required to comply with GIPS.
options.C: the charterholder is required to comply with GIPS.

questions.explanation: Adoption of GIPS is voluntary for firms. GIPS apply to firms, not individuals.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：GIPS（全球投资业绩标准）的适用对象是机构而非个人，且采用是自愿的。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 明确GIPS的适用对象：GIPS是针对投资管理公司（机构）的业绩报告标准，不直接约束个人。  
2. 判断情景中的主体：题目中首席投资官（个人）是CFA持证人，但GIPS的合规主体是其所在公司。  
3. 结合自愿性原则：公司是否采用GIPS是自愿的，不因员工是CFA持证人而强制要求。  
**易错提示**：不要混淆CFA持证人的职业操守要求与GIPS对机构的适用性。

questions.question: Ralph Lim and Susan Bland have both passed Level | of the CFA Program. Both are currently enrolled to sit for Level II. Lim's business card reads, "Ralph Lim, CFA Level I." Bland's resume states, "Level I| Candidate in the CFA Program." According to CFA Institute Standards of Professional Conduct involving use of the professional designation:

options.A: Bland violated the Standard, but Lim did not.
options.B: Both Lim and Bland violated the Standard.
options.C: Lim violated the Standard, but Bland did not.

questions.explanation: There is no designation for someone who has passed Level I, Level II, or Level III of the CFA examination. Candidates may state, however, that they have completed Level I, Il, or Ill, as the case may be, in the CFA Program. Thus, Lim violated the Standard, but Bland did not.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：CFA职业行为准则中关于专业称号使用的规定，特别是通过不同级别考试后如何正确表述身份。

**解题步骤**：
1. 明确准则规定：通过CFA一级、二级或三级考试本身并不授予任何专业称号（如“CFA Level I”），考生不能以此自称。
2. 分析Lim的行为：其名片上写“CFA Level I”，这错误地暗示了一个不存在的专业称号，违反了准则。
3. 分析Bland的行为：其简历写“Level II Candidate in the CFA Program”，这仅如实说明了其项目参与状态和候选级别，是允许的表述。

**易错提示**：容易混淆“通过某一级别考试”与“拥有某一级别称号”，前者是事实陈述，后者是违规表述。

questions.question: Mary Hiller, CFA, is a senior analyst at a mutual fund. She is also a member of the Board of the Directors of her daughter's Skating Club. She is often asked for advice about the management of the club budget and about possible short-term investments, but she is not paid for this advice. She does not undertake any research to answer these questions, providing information based only on the general practices of the mutual fund at that moment. The only benefit she receives is a free monthly membership for her daughter that would usually cost $182. What should she do before making any recommendations, in order to comply with the CFA Institute requirements?

options.A: Consult only on her free time and do not accept any benefit greater than $100. x
options.B: Inform her current clients about her outside consulting.
options.C: Obtain prior permission from her employer.

questions.explanation: According to Standard IV(A) Loyalty to Employer, it is the employee's duty to inform the employer about any type of outside consulting service, including duration and any compensation. Only after receiving permission from her employer, can she proceed.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业准则中IV(A)对雇主的忠诚（Loyalty to Employer）条款，要求会员在从事外部咨询活动前需获得雇主许可。

**解题步骤**：
1. 识别题干核心：Hiller虽未收取咨询费，但为外部组织（滑冰俱乐部）提供投资建议，并获得了非现金利益（女儿会员资格减免）。
2. 根据CFA准则IV(A)：任何可能与雇主利益冲突、占用工作时间或利用雇主资源的“外部活动”，都必须事先获得雇主书面同意。
3. 对比选项：C选项“获得雇主事先许可”直接对应准则要求；A选项的金额限制和B选项的告知客户均非核心解决措施。

**易错提示**：易误选A，但准则关注的是外部活动是否获得雇主批准，而非具体收益金额或是否在业余时间进行。

questions.question: Jan Hirsh, CFA, is employed as manager of a college endowment fund. The college's endowment is held by the brokerage firm Advisors, Inc. Over the years, Hirsh has developed a solid relationship with Advisors. Because of this relationship, Advisors has given her their Platinum level service for her personal account. Advisors ordinarily gives the Platinum level only to clients who do a minimum of $2,500 of commission business in a year. Hirsh has never reached the $2,500 commission level and probably will never do so. According to Standard IV(B), Additional Compensation Arrangements, Hirsh needs to:

options.A: inform her supervisor in writing about the Platinum account.
options.B: inform her supervisor verbally about the Platinum account.
options.C: do none of the actions listed here.

questions.explanation: Having the Platinum account is a benefit from her managing the endowment, which led to the relationship with Advisors. Members should report to their employers any additional compensation or benefits they receive for their services. This must be in writing. Doing $2,500 in business alone will not negate her obligation unless she explicitly tells Advisors that she is willing to accept whatever penalties accompany a Platinum account when a client does less business.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业准则中IV(B)条款（额外报酬安排）的应用，要求披露因雇佣关系获得的额外利益。  
**解题步骤**：  
1. 识别题干关键点：Hirsh因管理大学捐赠基金而与经纪商建立关系，从而获得个人账户的“铂金级服务”（通常需年佣金≥2500美元），但她本人并未达到该门槛。  
2. 根据准则IV(B)，会员必须向雇主书面披露因提供服务而获得的任何额外报酬或福利。  
3. 对比选项：A选项“书面告知上级”符合准则要求；B选项“口头告知”不符合书面要求；C选项“无需行动”错误。  
**易错提示**：注意披露必须是书面形式，且不能以“未达到佣金门槛”或“关系良好”为由免除披露义务。

questions.question: An analyst meets with a new client. During the meeting, the analyst sees that the new client's portfolio is heavily invested in one over-the-counter stock. The analyst has been following the stock and thinks it will perform well in the long run. The analyst arranges through a brokerage firm to simultaneously sell a large number of shares of the stock via a series of cross trades from the new client's portfolio to various existing clients. He arranges the trades to be executed at a price that approximates the current market price. This action is:

options.A: not in violation of the Standards.
options.B: a violation of Standard I||(A), Loyalty, Prudence, and Care.
options.C: a violation of Standard I||(B), Fair Dealing.

questions.explanation: There is no violation. It is in the best interest of the client to be diversified and selling via a series of cross trades will likely reduce price impact costs when compared to selling directly into the market. The analyst appears to have reasonable basis for putting the securities in the accounts of other clients.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业行为准则中关于客户忠诚、审慎与公平对待的标准应用，特别是涉及交叉交易（cross trades）的情形。

**解题步骤**：
1. 分析行为本质：分析师将新客户过度集中的股票，通过一系列交叉交易出售给其他现有客户，交易价格接近市价。
2. 判断是否符合准则：该行为旨在帮助新客户实现分散化（符合其最佳利益），且通过交叉交易可能减少市场冲击成本，对其他客户也有合理投资依据。
3. 结论：该操作未违反忠诚、审慎或公平对待标准，因为其出发点是为客户利益考虑，且执行方式合理。

**易错提示**：不要误以为将股票从一个客户账户转到其他客户账户本身就构成不公平对待，需结合具体情境和交易目的判断。

questions.question: Gordon McKinney, CFA, works in the trust department of a bank. The bank's trust account holds a large block of a particular company. Mckinney learns that this company is going to buy back one million shares at a 15% premium to the market price on a first-come-first- served basis. McKinney immediately tells his mother-in-law to tender her shares but waits until the end of the day to tender the trust's shares. McKinney hasnost likely violated:
questions.explanation: Standard VI(B), Priority of Transactions, applies. If an analyst decides to make a recommendation about the purchase or sale of a security, he must give his customers or employer adequate opportunity to act on this recommendation before acting on his own behalf. Personal transactions include those made for the member's own account and family accounts. Here, McKinney violated Standard VI(B) by acting on his mother-in-law's behalf and then waiting until the end of the day to act on his employer's behalf. Explanations for other responses: • Standard IV(A), Loyalty to Employer, does not apply. This standard concerns a member competing with his/her employer (independent practice), for example a member who engages in outside consulting. • Standard ||(A), Material Nonpublic Information, does not apply. The question does not indicate that the information is not public.
questions.tips:
**考查要点**：本题考察CFA职业准则中交易优先顺序（Standard VI(B)）的适用情形，特别是涉及个人账户与雇主账户交易时的处理原则。

**解题步骤**：
1. 识别关键行为：McKinney得知公司将以溢价回购股票后，立即让其岳母递交股票，但等到当天晚些时候才为雇主（信托账户）递交。
2. 判断准则核心：Standard VI(B)要求客户和雇主的交易必须优先于个人或关联方账户的交易。
3. 得出结论：McKinney让岳母（关联方）的交易先于雇主执行，违反了交易优先顺序准则。

**易错提示**：注意区分内幕信息违规（需信息是非公开的）与交易优先顺序违规（核心是交易执行的先后次序）。

questions.question: Jess Green, CFA is the research director for Castle Investment, Inc., and has supervisory responsibility over eight analysts, including three CFA charterholders. Castle has a compliance program in place.
